---
title: "Metabolomics_Loreal"
output: html_document
date: "2024-09-25"
---

```{r packages}
library(tidyverse)
library(mixOmics)
library(ggpubr)
library(vegan)
library(caret)
library(rstatix)
library(UpSetR)
library(homologueDiscoverer)
library(ggdensity)
library(cowplot)
library(readxl)
library(lmerTest)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(MassTools)
library(shiny)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(svglite)
library(Cairo)
```
```{r}
#Function for homologues analysis
plotAnnotatedStatic <- function(annotated, legend_setting = "bottom"){
  
  annotated <- mutate(annotated,
                      homologue_id = if_else(is.na(homologue_id), 0L, homologue_id),
                      homologue_id = as.factor(homologue_id))
  colourCount = length(unique(annotated$homologue_id))
  getPalette = colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "Set1"))
  ncolor = length(unique(annotated$homologue_id))
  annotated <- arrange(annotated, desc(homologue_id))
  g <- ggplot(annotated, aes(group = homologue_id)) +
    geom_point(aes(x = rt, y = mz, color = homologue_id, size = homologue_id,
                   shape = homologue_id, alpha = homologue_id)) +
    geom_line(data = filter(annotated, homologue_id != 0),
              aes(x = rt, y = mz, group = homologue_id), alpha = 0.4, linewidth = 0.1) +
    ggtitle("Annotated Peak Table") +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c("black", getPalette(colourCount-1))) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values =  c(0.2, rep(0.85, times = ncolor))) +
    scale_size_manual(values = c(0.1, rep(1.5, times = ncolor))) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c(1, rep(19, times = ncolor))) +
    xlab("Retention Time (s)") +
    ylab("Mass to Charge Ratio") +
    theme(legend.position=legend_setting, text = element_text(family="mono"))
  return(g)
  
}
```



```{r}
#Run 3
feature_table <- read_csv("../Data/metabolomics/Run3_10252024/FBMN_mgf_Lami_10252024_quant.csv")

#metadata <- read_csv("../Metadata/metadata_final_18062024.csv")
metadata <- read_csv("../data_Tyler/metadata_Tyler_reordered.csv")

sample_order <- read.csv("../Data/metabolomics/Run3_10252024/Sequence_order_10262024.csv")
#with suspects
annotations <- read.delim("../Data/metabolomics/Run3_10252024/merged_results_with_gnps.tsv")
#without suspects
#annotations <- read.delim("../Data/metabolomics/Run3_10252024/merged_results_with_gnps_withoutsuspects.tsv")
annotations$X.Scan. <- as.character(annotations$X.Scan.)
canopus <- read_tsv("../Data/metabolomics/Run3_10252024/canopus_structure_summary.tsv")
canopus$featureId <- as.character(canopus$featureId)

mapping_file <- read.csv("../Data/metabolomics/Run3_10252024/Mapping_10262024.csv")
```

```{r}
duplicates_in_metadata <- metadata[metadata$sample_name %in% metadata$sample_name[duplicated(metadata$sample_name)], ]

```

```{r}
mapping_file$Manifest_ID_Sample_Name <- gsub("_", ".", mapping_file$Manifest_ID_Sample_Name)

metadata_2 <- metadata %>% left_join(mapping_file, by = c("sample_name" = "Manifest_ID_Sample_Name"))
```

```{r}
metadata_2$SampleID <- metadata_2$Filename_ID
```

```{r}
duplicates_in_metadata <- metadata_2[metadata_2$sample_name %in% metadata_2$sample_name[duplicated(metadata_2$sample_name)], ]

```

```{r}
# Reorder the columns, placing metadata_final$SampleID as the first column
metadata_2 <- metadata_2[, c("SampleID", setdiff(names(metadata_2), "SampleID"))]

```


```{r}
# Find the rows in mapping_file where Filename_ID is not present in metadata_final$SampleID
missing_sample_ids <- mapping_file[!(mapping_file$Filename_ID %in% metadata_2$SampleID), ]

# Create a new data frame with only the missing Filename_ID as SampleID
missing_sample_ids_df <- data.frame(SampleID = missing_sample_ids$Filename_ID)

# Append only the SampleIDs to metadata_final
# This assumes metadata_final has more columns, and we just add the missing SampleIDs with other columns left blank
missing_rows <- data.frame(SampleID = missing_sample_ids_df$SampleID, 
                           matrix(NA, nrow = nrow(missing_sample_ids_df), ncol = ncol(metadata_2) - 1))
colnames(missing_rows) <- colnames(metadata_2)

missing_rows <- missing_rows[!(missing_rows$SampleID %in% metadata_2$SampleID), ]

metadata_final <- rbind(metadata_2, missing_rows)

# Print or save the updated metadata_final
head(metadata_final)


```
```{r}
duplicates_in_metadata <- metadata_final[metadata_final$sample_name %in% metadata_final$sample_name[duplicated(metadata_final$sample_name)], ]
```

```{r}
# Assuming updated_metadata_final is your data frame with SampleID column

metadata_final <- metadata_final %>%
  mutate(Sample_Type = case_when(
    str_detect(SampleID, regex("wash", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Wash",
    str_detect(SampleID, regex("Blank", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Blank",
    str_detect(SampleID, "^QC_P[0-9]+_[0-9]+$") | str_detect(SampleID, regex("6mix", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "6mix",
    str_detect(SampleID, regex("Pool", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Pooled samples",
    str_detect(SampleID, regex("CTL", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "CTL",
    TRUE ~ "samples"  # Default to 'samples' for SampleIDs that don't match the others
  ))

# Print or inspect the updated metadata_final with Sample_Type column
head(metadata_final)
```

```{r}
sum(metadata_final$Sample_Type=="samples")
```








```{r}
#L'Oreal data
metadata_final <- metadata_final %>% left_join(sample_order, by = c("SampleID" = "File.Name"))

```

```{r}
unmatched_metadata <- metadata_final %>%
  anti_join(sample_order, by = c("SampleID" = "File.Name"))

# View the result
unmatched_metadata

```
```{r}
unmatched_sample_order <- sample_order %>%
  anti_join(metadata_final, by = c("File.Name" = "SampleID"))

# View the result
unmatched_sample_order

```

```{r}
# Check for duplicated SampleIDs after the join
duplicated_samples <- metadata_final %>%
  group_by(SampleID) %>%
  filter(n() > 1)

# Display the duplicated SampleIDs
cat("Duplicated SampleIDs after the join:\n")
print(duplicated_samples)

# Optionally, count the number of duplicates
num_duplicates <- nrow(duplicated_samples)
cat("\nNumber of duplicated SampleIDs after the join: ", num_duplicates, "\n")
```

```{r}

info_feature <- feature_table %>% dplyr::select(1:3,7)
colnames(info_feature) <- c("Feature", "mz", "RT", "Corr_ID")
info_feature$Feature <- as.character(info_feature$Feature)

info_feature_complete <- info_feature %>% 
  left_join(annotations, by = c("Feature" = "X.Scan.")) %>%
  dplyr::select(1:4,18,24) %>% 
  left_join(canopus %>% distinct(featureId, .keep_all = TRUE), by = c("Feature" = "featureId"))



```




```{r}
# Extract data table 
data <- feature_table %>% 
  column_to_rownames("row ID") %>% dplyr::select(contains("Peak")) %>% 
  t() %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% 
  arrange(SampleID) %>% distinct(SampleID, .keep_all = TRUE)

data$SampleID <- gsub(".mzML Peak area", "", data$SampleID)


```



```{r}
# Find the rows in mapping_file where Filename_ID is not present in metadata_final$SampleID

missing_sample_ids <- data[!(data$SampleID %in% metadata_final$SampleID), ]

```

```{r}
# Find the rows in mapping_file where Filename_ID is not present in metadata_final$SampleID
missing_samples <- metadata_final[!(metadata_final$SampleID %in% data$SampleID), ]
# LAMI.RD318.D4.C1 did not run
```
```{r}
metadata_ids <- metadata_final$SampleID
data_ids <- data$SampleID

# 1. Find SampleIDs in metadata_final but not in data
missing_in_data <- setdiff(metadata_ids, data_ids)

# 2. Find SampleIDs in data but not in metadata_final
missing_in_metadata <- setdiff(data_ids, metadata_ids)

# 3. Check for duplicated SampleIDs in metadata_final
duplicates_in_metadata <- metadata_ids[duplicated(metadata_ids)]

# 4. Check for duplicated SampleIDs in data
duplicates_in_data <- data_ids[duplicated(data_ids)]

# Print results
cat("SampleIDs in metadata_final but not in data:\n")
print(missing_in_data)

cat("\nSampleIDs in data but not in metadata_final:\n")
print(missing_in_metadata)

cat("\nDuplicated SampleIDs in metadata_final:\n")
print(duplicates_in_metadata)

cat("\nDuplicated SampleIDs in data:\n")
print(duplicates_in_data)

```

```{r}
data_final <- data %>% 
  dplyr::filter(!(SampleID %in% c("blank_P2_0A_prerun", "blank_P3_0A_prerun_20241022011201", "blank_P3_0B_prerun","blank_P1_0A_prerun","QC_P1_6mix_0", "QC_P1_Pool_0", "QC_P1_6mix_0_20241019144629", "blank_P1_0A_prerun_20241019143524")))
```
```{r}
samples_to_remove <- c("blank_P2_0A_prerun", "blank_P3_0A_prerun_20241022011201", "blank_P3_0B_prerun",
                       "blank_P1_0A_prerun", "QC_P1_6mix_0", "QC_P1_Pool_0","QC_P1_6mix_0_20241019144629", "blank_P1_0A_prerun_20241019143524")

# Check if any sample is missing in the dataset
missing_samples <- setdiff(samples_to_remove, data$SampleID)

# Issue a warning for missing samples
if (length(missing_samples) > 0) {
  warning(paste("The following samples are not present in the dataset:", paste(missing_samples, collapse = ", ")))
}

```

```{r}
# Calculate Total Ion Count (TIC)
data_TIC <- data.frame(TIC = rowSums(data_final %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID"))) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(sample_order, by = c("SampleID" = "File.Name"))


```
```{r}
#Plots a scatter plot of the Order vs. TIC
data_TIC %>% dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(SampleID, regex("Blank|6mix|Pool|wash|CTL|QC", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>%
  left_join(metadata_final) %>%
  ggscatter("Order", "TIC", color = "host_subject_id", add = "reg.line") +
  stat_cor()
```
```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/TICvsOrder.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in")

```
data_combined <- data_final %>%
  dplyr::filter(str_detect(SampleID, "^QC_P[0-9]+_[0-9]+$") | 
                str_detect(SampleID, regex("6mix", ignore_case = TRUE)))
```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/TICvsOrder.svg", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", device = "svg")


```


```{r}
# Check sample type
sample_tic <-  data_TIC %>% dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(SampleID, regex("Blank|6mix|Pool|wash|CTL|QC", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>% summarise(mean(TIC))
pool_tic <- data_TIC %>% dplyr::filter((str_detect(SampleID, regex("Pool", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>% summarise(mean(TIC))
six_tic <- data_TIC %>%   dplyr::filter(str_detect(SampleID, "^QC_P[0-9]+_[0-9]+$") | str_detect(SampleID, regex("6mix", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>% summarise(mean(TIC))
blank_tic <- data_TIC %>% dplyr::filter((str_detect(SampleID, regex("blank", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>% summarise(mean(TIC))
#internal control swabs given by L'Oréal
ctl_tic <- data_TIC %>% dplyr::filter((str_detect(SampleID, regex("CTL", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>% summarise(mean(TIC))


ratio_tic_pb <- pool_tic/sample_tic
ratio_tic_sb <- sample_tic/blank_tic
ratio_tic_6p <- pool_tic/six_tic
```



```{r}
# Check TIC overtime for QCpool and Blanks
a0 <- data_TIC %>% dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(SampleID, regex("Blank|6mix|Pool|wash|CTL|QC", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>% 
  ggscatter("Order", "TIC", add = "reg.line") +
  stat_cor() +ylim(0, 7e9) + ggtitle("TIC over Time for Samples")

a <- data_TIC %>% dplyr::filter((str_detect(SampleID, regex("Pool", ignore_case = TRUE))))%>% 
  ggscatter("Order", "TIC", add = "reg.line") +
  stat_cor() +ylim(0, 7e9) + ggtitle("TIC over Time for Pooled Samples")

b <- data_TIC %>%   dplyr::filter(str_detect(SampleID, "^QC_P[0-9]+_[0-9]+$") | str_detect(SampleID, regex("6mix", ignore_case = TRUE)))  %>% 
  ggscatter("Order", "TIC", add = "reg.line") +
  stat_cor() +ylim(0, 7e9) + ggtitle("TIC over Time for 6mix Samples")

c <- data_TIC %>% dplyr::filter((str_detect(SampleID, regex("blank", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>% 
  ggscatter("Order", "TIC", add = "reg.line") +
  stat_cor()  +ylim(0, 7e9) + ggtitle("TIC over Time for Blank Samples")

d <- data_TIC %>%  dplyr::filter((str_detect(SampleID, regex("CTL", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>% 
  ggscatter("Order", "TIC", add = "reg.line") +
  stat_cor() +ylim(0, 7e9) + ggtitle("TIC over Time for Blank Swab Samples (CTL)")



```

```{r}
f <- ggarrange(a0, a, b, c, d, ncol = 3, nrow = 2, labels = c("a", "b", "c", "d", "e"))

```

```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/TICvsOrder_all.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 16, height = 10, units = "in")

```

```{r}
# Identify SampleIDs in data_TIC that are not in data_final
missing_sample_ids <- data_TIC$SampleID[!(data_final$SampleID %in% data_TIC$SampleID)]

# Display or print the missing SampleIDs
print(missing_sample_ids)

```
```{r}
# Check for duplicate SampleIDs in data_TIC
duplicates_in_data_TIC <- data_TIC$SampleID[duplicated(data_TIC$SampleID)]

# Display the duplicate SampleIDs
print(duplicates_in_data_TIC)

```

```{r}
# Step 1: Filter by SampleID and count the remaining samples
filtered_by_sampleid <- data_TIC %>%
  dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(SampleID, regex("Blank|6mix|Pool|wash|CTL|QC", ignore_case = TRUE))))
count_after_sampleid <- nrow(filtered_by_sampleid)

# Step 2: Filter by TIC range within the previously filtered dataset and count
data_tic_filtered <- filtered_by_sampleid %>%
  dplyr::filter(TIC >= 6e8 & TIC <= 5e9)
count_after_tic <- nrow(data_tic_filtered)

# Step 3: Identify SampleIDs that do not meet both filtering criteria
# Samples in filtered_by_sampleid but not in data_tic_filtered
excluded_samples <- anti_join(filtered_by_sampleid, data_tic_filtered, by = "SampleID")

# Step 4: Remove these excluded samples from the original data_TIC
data_TIC_updated <- data_TIC %>%
  dplyr::anti_join(excluded_samples, by = "SampleID")

# Print counts for reference
cat("Initial sample count:", nrow(data_TIC), "\n")
cat("Count after SampleID filtering:", count_after_sampleid, "\n")
cat("Final count after TIC filtering:", count_after_tic, "\n")
cat("Remaining samples in data_TIC_final:", nrow(data_TIC_updated), "\n")

# Display filtered data
head(data_TIC_updated)


```
```{r}
data_final_updated <- data_final %>% 
  dplyr::filter(!(SampleID %in% excluded_samples$SampleID))
```

```{r}
# Step 1: Filter out samples that match "Blank", "6mix", "Pool", "wash", "CTL", or "QC" from the subset
# and apply additional filtering to keep only those within the TIC range.
data_tic_filtered <- data_TIC %>%
  dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(SampleID, regex("Blank|6mix|Pool|wash|CTL|QC", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>%
  dplyr::filter(TIC >= 6e8 & TIC <= 5e9)

# Step 2: Plot the filtered data to visualize TIC over time for the selected samples.
a0 <- data_tic_filtered %>%
  ggscatter("Order", "TIC", add = "reg.line") +
  stat_cor()  +ylim(0, 7e9) +
  ggtitle("TIC over Time for Filtered Samples")

a <- data_TIC %>% dplyr::filter((str_detect(SampleID, regex("Pool", ignore_case = TRUE))))%>% 
  ggscatter("Order", "TIC", add = "reg.line") +
  stat_cor() +ylim(0, 7e9) + ggtitle("TIC over Time for Pooled Samples")

b <- data_TIC %>%   dplyr::filter(str_detect(SampleID, "^QC_P[0-9]+_[0-9]+$") | str_detect(SampleID, regex("6mix", ignore_case = TRUE)))  %>% 
  ggscatter("Order", "TIC", add = "reg.line") +
  stat_cor() +ylim(0, 7e9) + ggtitle("TIC over Time for 6mix Samples")

c <- data_TIC %>% dplyr::filter((str_detect(SampleID, regex("blank", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>% 
  ggscatter("Order", "TIC", add = "reg.line") +
  stat_cor()  +ylim(0, 7e9) + ggtitle("TIC over Time for Blank Samples")

d <- data_TIC %>%  dplyr::filter((str_detect(SampleID, regex("CTL", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>% 
  ggscatter("Order", "TIC", add = "reg.line") +
  stat_cor() +ylim(0, 7e9) + ggtitle("TIC over Time for Blank Swab Samples (CTL)")

# Display the plot
print(a0)

```
```{r}
f <- ggarrange(a0, a, b, c, d, ncol = 3, nrow = 2, labels = c("a", "b", "c", "d", "e"))
```

```{r}
  left_join(metadata_final) %>%
  ggscatter("Order", "TIC", color = "host_subject_id", add = "reg.line") +
```

```{r}
#to plot the Plate_Number run this code 
#sample_order_2 <- read.csv("../data/rerun_blue_sequence_p1_4.csv") %>% dplyr::select(1,3,23)
```


```{r}
sample_order_2 <- merge(
  sample_order, 
  mapping_file[, c("Filename_ID", "Plate_Number")], 
  by.x = "File.Name", 
  by.y = "Filename_ID", 
  all.x = TRUE
)
```

```{r}
data_tic_plate <- data_TIC %>%
  left_join(sample_order_2, by = c("SampleID" = "File.Name", "Order" = "Order"))

```
```{r}
# SampleIDs in data_TIC that did not merge into data_tic_plate (i.e., not present in sample_order_2)
not_in_sample_order <- data_TIC %>%
  anti_join(sample_order_2, by = c("SampleID" = "File.Name", "Order" = "Order"))

# SampleIDs in sample_order_2 that did not merge into data_tic_plate (i.e., not present in data_TIC)
not_in_data_TIC <- sample_order_2 %>%
  anti_join(data_TIC, by = c("File.Name" = "SampleID", "Order" = "Order"))

```



```{r}
# Convert Plate_Number to a factor for consistent coloring across all plots
data_tic_plate <- data_tic_plate %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Plate_Number = as.factor(Plate_Number))

# Define the mapping of specific colors to specific Plate_Number values
custom_colors <- c("1" = "#D55E00",  # Plate_Number == 1
                   "2" = "#2B579A",  # Plate_Number == 2
                   "3" = "#A1280B",  # Plate_Number == 3
                   "4" = "#217346")  # Plate_Number == 4

# TIC over Time for Samples (a0)
a0 <- data_tic_plate %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Plate_Number = as.factor(Plate_Number)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(SampleID, regex("Blank|6mix|Pool|wash|CTL|QC", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>% 
  ggscatter(x = "Order", y = "TIC", color = "Plate_Number") + 
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors, name = "Plate Number") +  # Map specific colors
  stat_cor() +ylim(0, 7e9)+ 
  ggtitle("TIC over Time for Samples")

# TIC over Time for Pooled Samples (a)
a <- data_tic_plate %>%
  dplyr::filter((str_detect(SampleID, regex("Pool", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>%
  ggscatter(x = "Order", y = "TIC", color = "Plate_Number") + 
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors, name = "Plate Number") + 
  stat_cor() +ylim(0, 7e9)+ 
  ggtitle("TIC over Time for Pooled Samples")

# TIC over Time for 6mix Samples (b)
b <- data_tic_plate %>%
  dplyr::filter(str_detect(SampleID, "^QC_P[0-9]+_[0-9]+$") | str_detect(SampleID, regex("6mix", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  ggscatter(x = "Order", y = "TIC", color = "Plate_Number") + 
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors, name = "Plate Number") + 
  stat_cor() +ylim(0, 7e9)+ 
  ggtitle("TIC over Time for 6mix Samples")

# TIC over Time for Blank Samples (c)
c <- data_tic_plate %>%
  dplyr::filter((str_detect(SampleID, regex("blank", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>%
  ggscatter(x = "Order", y = "TIC", color = "Plate_Number") + 
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors, name = "Plate Number") + 
  stat_cor() +ylim(0, 7e9)+ 
  ggtitle("TIC over Time for Blank Samples")

# TIC over Time for Blank Swab Samples (CTL) (d)
d <- data_tic_plate %>%
  dplyr::filter((str_detect(SampleID, regex("CTL", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>%
  ggscatter(x = "Order", y = "TIC", color = "Plate_Number") + 
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors, name = "Plate Number") + 
  stat_cor() +ylim(0, 7e9)+ 
  ggtitle("TIC over Time for Blank Swab Samples (CTL)")


```

```{r}
f <- ggarrange(
  a0, a, b, c, d, 
  ncol = 3, nrow = 2, 
  labels = c("a", "b", "c", "d", "e"),
  common.legend = TRUE,  # Use a common legend
  legend = "bottom"      # Place the legend at the bottom
)

```
```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/TICvsOrder_all_platenumber.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 16, height = 10, units = "in")

```

```{r}
#filter by TIC 
# Convert Plate_Number to a factor for consistent coloring across all plots
data_tic_plate <- data_tic_plate %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Plate_Number = as.factor(Plate_Number))

# Define the mapping of specific colors to specific Plate_Number values
custom_colors <- c("1" = "#D55E00",  # Plate_Number == 1
                   "2" = "#2B579A",  # Plate_Number == 2
                   "3" = "#A1280B",  # Plate_Number == 3
                   "4" = "#217346")  # Plate_Number == 4

# TIC over Time for Samples (a0)
a0 <- data_tic_plate %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Plate_Number = as.factor(Plate_Number)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(SampleID, regex("Blank|6mix|Pool|wash|CTL|QC", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>%
  dplyr::filter(TIC >= 6e8 & TIC <= 5e9) %>%
  ggscatter(x = "Order", y = "TIC", color = "Plate_Number") + 
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors, name = "Plate Number") +  # Map specific colors
  stat_cor() +ylim(0, 7e9)+ 
  ggtitle("TIC over Time for Samples")

# TIC over Time for Pooled Samples (a)
a <- data_tic_plate %>%
  dplyr::filter((str_detect(SampleID, regex("Pool", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>%
  ggscatter(x = "Order", y = "TIC", color = "Plate_Number") + 
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors, name = "Plate Number") + 
  stat_cor() +ylim(0, 7e9)+ 
  ggtitle("TIC over Time for Pooled Samples")

# TIC over Time for 6mix Samples (b)
b <- data_tic_plate %>%
  dplyr::filter(str_detect(SampleID, "^QC_P[0-9]+_[0-9]+$") | str_detect(SampleID, regex("6mix", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>%
  ggscatter(x = "Order", y = "TIC", color = "Plate_Number") + 
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors, name = "Plate Number") + 
  stat_cor() +ylim(0, 7e9)+ 
  ggtitle("TIC over Time for 6mix Samples")

# TIC over Time for Blank Samples (c)
c <- data_tic_plate %>%
  dplyr::filter((str_detect(SampleID, regex("blank", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>%
  ggscatter(x = "Order", y = "TIC", color = "Plate_Number") + 
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors, name = "Plate Number") + 
  stat_cor() +ylim(0, 7e9)+ 
  ggtitle("TIC over Time for Blank Samples")

# TIC over Time for Blank Swab Samples (CTL) (d)
d <- data_tic_plate %>%
  dplyr::filter((str_detect(SampleID, regex("CTL", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>%
  ggscatter(x = "Order", y = "TIC", color = "Plate_Number") + 
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors, name = "Plate Number") + 
  stat_cor() +ylim(0, 7e9)+ 
  ggtitle("TIC over Time for Blank Swab Samples (CTL)")

```
```{r}
f <- ggarrange(
  a0, a, b, c, d, 
  ncol = 3, nrow = 2, 
  labels = c("a", "b", "c", "d", "e"),
  common.legend = TRUE,  # Use a common legend
  legend = "bottom"      # Place the legend at the bottom
)
```


```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/TICvsOrder_all_platenumber_filtered.svg", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 16, height = 10, units = "in")
```

```{r}

data_tic_group <- data_TIC %>%
  left_join(metadata_2, by = c("SampleID" = "SampleID"))

# Define custom orange, pine green, brown, and Excel-style green color palette
custom_colors <- c("#df7963", "#67b2be", "#423fa6")  


# TIC over Time for Samples (a0)
a0 <- data_tic_group %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group = as.factor(category_label)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(SampleID, regex("Blank|6mix|Pool|wash|CTL|QC", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>%
  ggscatter(x = "Order", y = "TIC", color = "group") + 
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors, name = "group") +  # Use custom color palette
  stat_cor() + 
  ggtitle("TIC over Time for Samples")


```

```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/TICvsOrder_group.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 8, units = "in")
```
```{r}
data_tic_group <- data_TIC_updated %>%
  left_join(metadata_2, by = c("SampleID" = "SampleID"))

# Define custom orange, pine green, brown, and Excel-style green color palette
custom_colors <- c("#df7963", "#67b2be", "#423fa6")  


# TIC over Time for Samples (a0)
a0 <- data_tic_group %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group = as.factor(category_label)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(SampleID, regex("Blank|6mix|Pool|wash|CTL|QC", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>%
  ggscatter(x = "Order", y = "TIC", color = "group") + 
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors, name = "group") +  # Use custom color palette
  stat_cor() + 
  ggtitle("TIC over Time for Samples")

```

```{r}
#find the 6mix antibiotics
abundance_data <- subset(data_final_updated, SampleID == "QC_P2_6mix_4")

# Remove the SampleID column before transposing
abundance_data <- abundance_data[ , !(names(abundance_data) %in% "SampleID")]

# Transpose the data and convert values to numeric
abundance_data <- as.data.frame(t(abundance_data))
abundance_data <- as.numeric(as.matrix(abundance_data))
```



```{r}
# Check internal standard and remove sample where there was a shift
fbmn_IS <- annotations %>% dplyr::filter(str_detect(Compound_Name, regex("sulf", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>% 
  distinct(X.Scan., .keep_all = TRUE) %>% dplyr::filter(Organism != "BILELIB19")
```
```{r}
# Check internal standard and remove sample where there was a shift
fbmn_IS <- annotations %>% dplyr::filter(str_detect(Compound_Name, regex("Amitri", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>% 
  distinct(X.Scan., .keep_all = TRUE) %>% dplyr::filter(Organism != "BILELIB19")
```



15435
10110
21846
	
10762
```{r}
#sulfadimethoxine was the one that was used according to Jasmine 
#instead of 974 --> X.Scan 18243 --> 	491 --> 15435
# Extract IS feature from the table
table_IS <- data_final %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% t() %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("ID") %>% 
  dplyr::filter(ID %in% fbmn_IS$X.Scan.) %>% column_to_rownames("ID") %>% t() %>% as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column("filename") %>% left_join(metadata_final, by = c("filename" = "SampleID")) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(filename, regex("Blank|6mix|Pool|wash|CTL|QC", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>%
  dplyr::select(filename, `15435`, Order, filename)
```

```{r}
table_IS <- data_final_updated %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% t() %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("ID") %>% 
  dplyr::filter(ID %in% fbmn_IS$X.Scan.) %>% column_to_rownames("ID") %>% t() %>% as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column("filename") %>% left_join(metadata_final, by = c("filename" = "SampleID")) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(filename, regex("Blank|6mix|Pool|wash|CTL|QC", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>%
  dplyr::select(filename, `15435`, Order, filename) %>% dplyr::filter(`15435` >= 1e6 & `15435` <= 5e6)
```
15453
21848
20262
10110
491
10762

```{r}
table_IS <- data_final_updated %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% t() %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("ID") %>% 
  dplyr::filter(ID %in% fbmn_IS$X.Scan.) %>% column_to_rownames("ID") %>% t() %>% as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column("filename") %>% left_join(metadata_final, by = c("filename" = "SampleID")) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(filename, regex("Blank|6mix|Pool|wash|CTL|QC", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>%
  dplyr::select(filename, `15435`, Order, filename) %>% dplyr::filter(`15435` >= 1e6 & `15435` <= 5e6)
```

```{r}
colnames(table_IS)[2] <- "sulfadimethoxine"

table_IS %>% ggscatter(x = "Order", y = "sulfadimethoxine", add = c("reg.line")) +
  stat_cor() + ylim(0, 5e6)
```


```{r}
  stat_cor() #+ ylim(0, 5e6)
```

10110
15453
16885
```{r}
#sulfadimethoxine was the one that was used according to Jasmine 
#instead of 974 --> X.Scan 18243 --> 	491 --> 15435
# Extract IS feature from the table
table_IS <- data_final %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% t() %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("ID") %>% 
  dplyr::filter(ID %in% fbmn_IS$X.Scan.) %>% column_to_rownames("ID") %>% t() %>% as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column("filename") %>% left_join(metadata_final, by = c("filename" = "SampleID")) %>%
  dplyr::filter(str_detect(filename, "^QC_P[0-9]+_[0-9]+$") | str_detect(filename, regex("6mix", ignore_case = TRUE)))%>%
  dplyr::select(filename, `12511`, Order, filename)
```
#Scan Numbers of the 6 antibiotics 
10110 Sulfamethazine
15435 Sulfadimethoxine
16885 Amitriptyline
21848 Coumarin
12511 Sulfachloropyridazine
10762 Sulfadimethizole
```{r}
#sulfadimethoxine was the one that was used according to Jasmine 
#instead of 974 --> X.Scan 18243 --> 	491 --> 15435
# Extract IS feature from the table
table_IS <- data_final %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% t() %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("ID") %>% 
  column_to_rownames("ID") %>% t() %>% as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column("filename") %>% left_join(metadata_final, by = c("filename" = "SampleID")) %>%
  dplyr::filter(str_detect(filename, "^QC_P[0-9]+_[0-9]+$") | str_detect(filename, regex("6mix", ignore_case = TRUE)))%>%
  dplyr::select(filename, `16885`, Order, filename)
```
```{r}
colnames(table_IS)[2] <- "Coumarin_314"

Coumarin <- table_IS %>% ggscatter(x = "Order", y = "Coumarin_314", add = c("reg.line")) +
  stat_cor() + ylim(0, 7e9)#+ ylim(0, 4e7)

cv_is <- sd(table_IS$Coumarin_314)/mean(table_IS$Coumarin_314)
#24.75%
```

```{r}
colnames(table_IS)[2] <- "Sulfachloropyridazine"

Sulfachloropyridazine <- table_IS %>% ggscatter(x = "Order", y = "Sulfachloropyridazine", add = c("reg.line")) +
  stat_cor() + ylim(0, 7e9)#+ ylim(0, 4e7)

cv_is <- sd(table_IS$Sulfachloropyridazine)/mean(table_IS$Sulfachloropyridazine)
#66.78%
```

```{r}
colnames(table_IS)[2] <- "Sulfadimethizole"

Sulfadimethizole <- table_IS %>% ggscatter(x = "Order", y = "Sulfadimethizole", add = c("reg.line")) +
  stat_cor() + ylim(0, 7e9)#+ ylim(0, 4e7)

cv_is <- sd(table_IS$Sulfadimethizole)/mean(table_IS$Sulfadimethizole)
#68.34%
```

```{r}
colnames(table_IS)[2] <- "Amitriptyline"

Amitriptyline <- table_IS %>% ggscatter(x = "Order", y = "Amitriptyline", add = c("reg.line")) +
  stat_cor()  + ylim(0, 7e9)#+ ylim(0, 4e7)

cv_is <- sd(table_IS$Amitriptyline)/mean(table_IS$Amitriptyline)
#29.3%
```

```{r}
colnames(table_IS)[2] <- "Sulfadimethoxine"

sulfadimethoxine <- table_IS %>% ggscatter(x = "Order", y = "Sulfadimethoxine", add = c("reg.line")) +
  stat_cor() + ylim(0, 7e9)#+ ylim(0, 4e7)

cv_is <- sd(table_IS$Sulfadimethoxine)/mean(table_IS$Sulfadimethoxine)
#60.5%

```

```{r}
#10110
colnames(table_IS)[2] <- "Sulfamethazine"

sulfamethazine <- table_IS %>% ggscatter(x = "Order", y = "Sulfamethazine", add = c("reg.line")) +
  stat_cor() + ylim(0, 7e9)#ylim(0, 4e7)
cv_is <- sd(table_IS$Sulfamethazine)/mean(table_IS$Sulfamethazine)
#72.5%
```
```{r}
f <- ggarrange(
  sulfamethazine, sulfadimethoxine, Amitriptyline, Sulfadimethizole, Sulfachloropyridazine, Coumarin,
  ncol = 3, nrow = 2, 
  labels = c("a", "b", "c", "d", "e", "f"),
  common.legend = TRUE,  # Use a common legend
  legend = "bottom"      # Place the legend at the bottom
)
```
```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/sixmix_antibiotics_7e9.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 12, height = 8, units = "in")
```
```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/PeakArea_IS_sulfamethazine.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in")
```

```{r}
table_IS %>% ggbarplot(x = "Order", y = "sulfadimethoxine", xlab = "Run Order", 
                       ylab = "Peak Area sulfadimethoxine", title = "Internal Standard Acquisition") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = mean(table_IS$sulfadimethoxine, na.rm = TRUE), linetype = "dashed", color = "blue")

cv_is <- sd(table_IS$sulfadimethoxine)/mean(table_IS$sulfadimethoxine)

#CV is 39,53237% 
#CV is 12,6 % with threshold `15435` >= 1e6 & `15435` <= 5e6
```

```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/PeakArea_IS_filtered.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in")
```
```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/PeakArea_IS.svg", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in")
```


```{r}
# Filter table_IS for filenames with sulfadimethoxin < 22378
filtered_table_IS <- table_IS[table_IS$sulfadimethoxin < 1e6, "filename"]

# Filter data_TIC for SampleIDs with TIC < 569590420
filtered_data_TIC <- data_TIC[data_TIC$TIC < 5e8, "SampleID"]

# Find common values
common_filenames <- intersect(filtered_table_IS, filtered_data_TIC)

# Find values in table_IS but not in data_TIC
unique_to_table_IS <- setdiff(filtered_table_IS, filtered_data_TIC)

# Find values in data_TIC but not in table_IS
unique_to_data_TIC <- setdiff(filtered_data_TIC, filtered_table_IS)

# Print results
cat("Common filenames:\n")
print(common_filenames)

cat("\nFilenames in table_IS but not in data_TIC:\n")
print(unique_to_table_IS)

cat("\nFilenames in data_TIC but not in table_IS:\n")
print(unique_to_data_TIC)

```



```{r}
# Check features in blanks and pools
data_blank <- data_final %>% dplyr::filter((str_detect(SampleID, regex("blank", ignore_case = TRUE)))) 
data_pools <- data_final %>% dplyr::filter((str_detect(SampleID, regex("Pool", ignore_case = TRUE))))
data_sixmix <- data_final %>% dplyr::filter(str_detect(SampleID, "^QC_P[0-9]+_[0-9]+$") | str_detect(SampleID, regex("6mix", ignore_case = TRUE)))
data_CTL <- data_final %>% dplyr::filter((str_detect(SampleID, regex("CTL", ignore_case = TRUE))))
```

```{r}
# Check features in blanks and pools with filtering out the outliers
data_blank <- data_final_updated %>% dplyr::filter((str_detect(SampleID, regex("blank", ignore_case = TRUE)))) 
data_pools <- data_final_updated %>% dplyr::filter((str_detect(SampleID, regex("Pool", ignore_case = TRUE))))
data_sixmix <- data_final_updated %>% dplyr::filter(str_detect(SampleID, "^QC_P[0-9]+_[0-9]+$") | str_detect(SampleID, regex("6mix", ignore_case = TRUE)))
data_CTL <- data_final_updated %>% dplyr::filter((str_detect(SampleID, regex("CTL", ignore_case = TRUE))))
```


```{r}
# Blanks
blanks_feature_info <- data.frame(Feature = colnames(data_blank)[-1],
                                  Mean_blank = data_blank %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% colMeans(), 
                                  SD_blank =  data_blank %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% apply(2, sd)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(CV_blank = SD_blank/Mean_blank) %>% left_join(annotations, by = c("Feature" = "X.Scan.")) %>% 
  left_join(info_feature) %>% dplyr::select(Feature, mz, RT, Compound_Name, SpectrumID, 
                                            Precursor_MZ, Mean_blank, SD_blank, CV_blank) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Mean_blank > 0) %>% arrange(desc(Mean_blank))

```
```{r}
# Six mix
sixmix_feature_info <- data.frame(Feature = colnames(data_sixmix)[-1],
                                  Mean_sixmix = data_sixmix %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% colMeans(), 
                                  SD_sixmix = data_sixmix %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% apply(2, sd)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(CV_sixmix = SD_sixmix/Mean_sixmix) %>% left_join(annotations, by = c("Feature" = "X.Scan.")) %>% 
  left_join(info_feature) %>% dplyr::select(Feature, mz, RT, Compound_Name, SpectrumID, 
                                            Precursor_MZ, Mean_sixmix, SD_sixmix, CV_sixmix) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Mean_sixmix > 0) %>% arrange(desc(Mean_sixmix))
```

```{r}
# Pool
pools_feature_info <- data.frame(Feature = colnames(data_pools)[-1],
                                 Mean_pool = data_pools %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% colMeans(), 
                                 SD_pool =  data_pools %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% apply(2, sd)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(CV_pool = SD_pool/Mean_pool) %>% left_join(annotations, by = c("Feature" = "X.Scan.")) %>% 
  left_join(info_feature) %>% dplyr::select(Feature, mz, RT, Compound_Name, SpectrumID, 
                                            Precursor_MZ, Mean_pool, SD_pool, CV_pool) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Mean_pool > 0) %>% arrange(desc(Mean_pool))

```

```{r}
# CTLs
CTLs_feature_info <- data.frame(Feature = colnames(data_CTL)[-1],
                                 Mean_ctl = data_CTL %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% colMeans(), 
                                 SD_ctl =  data_CTL %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% apply(2, sd)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(CV_ctl = SD_ctl/Mean_ctl) %>% left_join(annotations, by = c("Feature" = "X.Scan.")) %>% 
  left_join(info_feature) %>% dplyr::select(Feature, mz, RT, Compound_Name, SpectrumID, 
                                            Precursor_MZ, Mean_ctl, SD_ctl, CV_ctl) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Mean_ctl > 0) %>% arrange(desc(Mean_ctl))
```

```{r}
# Features to be removed Pools/Blank < 5 or 10
feature_to_remove <- blanks_feature_info %>% left_join(pools_feature_info) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Mean_blank > 0) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Pool_Blank = Mean_pool/Mean_blank) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Pool_Blank < 5 | is.na(Pool_Blank))
```

```{r}
# Data with blank removal
data_clean <- data_final %>% dplyr::select(-c(feature_to_remove$Feature)) %>%
  column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>%
  select_if(~sum(.) != 0) %>% rownames_to_column("SampleID")
```

```{r}
# Data with blank removal after outlier removal
data_clean <- data_final_updated %>% dplyr::select(-c(feature_to_remove$Feature)) %>%
  column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>%
  select_if(~sum(.) != 0) %>% rownames_to_column("SampleID")
```

```{r}
# Features to be removed Pool/QCmix < 5 or 10 
feature_to_remove_mix <- sixmix_feature_info %>% left_join(pools_feature_info) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Mean_sixmix > 0) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Pool_Mix = Mean_pool/Mean_sixmix) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Pool_Mix < 5 | is.na(Pool_Mix)) %>% dplyr::filter(!(Feature %in% feature_to_remove$Feature))

# Data with blank2 removal
data_clean2 <- data_clean %>% dplyr::select(-c(feature_to_remove_mix$Feature))

```

```{r}
# Features to be removed Pool/CTL < 5 or 10 
feature_to_remove_ctl <- CTLs_feature_info %>% left_join(pools_feature_info) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Mean_ctl > 0) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Pool_CTL = Mean_pool/Mean_ctl) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Pool_CTL < 5 | is.na(Pool_CTL)) %>% dplyr::filter(!(Feature %in% feature_to_remove_mix$Feature))  %>%  dplyr::filter(!(Feature %in% feature_to_remove$Feature))

# Data with blank2 removal
data_clean3 <- data_clean2 %>% dplyr::select(-c(feature_to_remove_ctl$Feature))

```

```{r}
# Define the color palette for six Sample_Type categories
sample_type_colors <- c("samples" = "#1f77b4",  # Blue
                        "Blank" = "#ff7f0e",  # Orange
                        "Pooled samples" = "#2ca02c",  # Green
                        "CTL" = "#d62728",  # Red
                        "6mix" = "#9467bd",  # Purple
                        "Wash" = "#8c564b")  # Brown
```

```{r}
# PCA raw data
PCA_raw <- mixOmics::pca(data_clean2 %>% select_at(vars(-one_of(nearZeroVar(., names = TRUE)))) %>%
                           column_to_rownames("SampleID"), ncomp = 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)
PCA_raw_scores <- data.frame(PCA_raw$variates$X) %>% rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(metadata_final)

i <- "Sample_Type"

PCA_raw_plot <- PCA_raw_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, alpha = 0.6,
            title = paste("PCA - Skin Metabolome", i, sep = " "),
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_raw$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_raw$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  geom_point(data = PCA_raw_scores %>% group_by((!!sym(i))) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("PC")), mean), aes(PC1, PC2, color = (!!sym(i))), size = 4, shape = 8) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 4)) + coord_fixed() +
  scale_color_manual(values = sample_type_colors)

```
```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/PCA_data_clean2.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 10, height = 6, units = "in")
```
```{r}
# PCA raw data
PCA_raw <- mixOmics::pca(data_clean3 %>% select_at(vars(-one_of(nearZeroVar(., names = TRUE)))) %>%
                           column_to_rownames("SampleID"), ncomp = 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)
PCA_raw_scores <- data.frame(PCA_raw$variates$X) %>% rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(metadata_final)

i <- "Sample_Type"

PCA_raw_plot <- PCA_raw_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, alpha = 0.6,
            title = paste("PCA - Skin Metabolome", i, sep = " "),
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_raw$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_raw$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  geom_point(data = PCA_raw_scores %>% group_by((!!sym(i))) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("PC")), mean), aes(PC1, PC2, color = (!!sym(i))), size = 4, shape = 8) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 4)) + coord_fixed() +
  scale_color_manual(values = sample_type_colors)
```
```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/PCA_data_clean3.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 10, height = 6, units = "in")
```

```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/PCA_qc_5_filtered.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 10, height = 6, units = "in")
```

```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/PCA_qc_5.svg", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 10, height = 6, units = "in")
```
```{r}
data_clean_2_clr <- decostand(data_clean2 %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID"), method = "rclr")
```

```{r}
data_clean_2_clr <- decostand(data_clean3 %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID"), method = "rclr")
```

```{r}
# PCA
PCA_whole <- mixOmics::pca(data_clean_2_clr, ncomp = 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)
PCA_whole_scores <- data.frame(PCA_whole$variates$X) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(metadata_final)
PCA_whole_scores <- data.frame(PCA_whole$variates$X) %>% rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(metadata_final)
i <- "Sample_Type"

PCA_plot <- PCA_whole_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, alpha = 0.6,
            title = paste("PCA - Skin Metabolome - rclr transformed data"),
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  geom_point(data = PCA_whole_scores %>% group_by((!!sym(i))) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("PC")), mean), aes(PC1, PC2, color = (!!sym(i))), size = 4, shape = 8) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 4)) + coord_fixed()  +
  scale_color_manual(values = sample_type_colors)
```
```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/PCA_rclr_dataclean3.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 10, height = 6, units = "in")
```

```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/PCA_qc_rclr.svg", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 10, height = 6, units = "in")
```
```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/PCA_qc_rclr_filtered.svg", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 10, height = 6, units = "in")
```



```{r}
f <- ggarrange(
  PCA_raw_plot, PCA_plot, 
  ncol = 2, nrow = 1, 
  labels = c("a", "b"),
  common.legend = TRUE,  # Use a common legend
  legend = "right"  , align ="hv"    # Place the legend at the bottom
)

```

```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/PCA_combined_filtered.svg", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 10, height = 6, units = "in")
```

```{r}
# Remove plastic contamination
feature_check <- info_feature %>% dplyr::select(1:3) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Feature %in% colnames(data_clean)) %>% as_tibble()
colnames(feature_check) <- c("peak_id", "mz", "rt")
feature_check$mz <- as.double(feature_check$mz)
feature_check$rt <- as.double(feature_check$rt)
```


```{r}
# for 1 CTL sample 
feature_pool <- data_clean2 %>% 
  dplyr::filter(SampleID == "P4_A1_LAMI_CTL_19") %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>%
  t() %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("peak_id")

feature_check_pool <- feature_check %>% left_join(feature_pool)

feature_check_pool$peak_id <- as.integer(feature_check_pool$peak_id)
colnames(feature_check_pool)[4] <- "intensity"
```
```{r}
# Remove plastic contamination after removing CTLs (data_clean3)
feature_check <- info_feature %>% dplyr::select(1:3) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Feature %in% colnames(data_clean3)) %>% as_tibble()
colnames(feature_check) <- c("peak_id", "mz", "rt")
feature_check$mz <- as.double(feature_check$mz)
feature_check$rt <- as.double(feature_check$rt)
```

```{r}
# for 1 CTL sample 
feature_pool <- data_clean3 %>% 
  dplyr::filter(SampleID == "P4_A1_LAMI_CTL_19") %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>%
  t() %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("peak_id")

feature_check_pool <- feature_check %>% left_join(feature_pool)

feature_check_pool$peak_id <- as.integer(feature_check_pool$peak_id)
colnames(feature_check_pool)[4] <- "intensity"
```


```{r}
# Remove PEGs
peak_table_PEG <- detectHomologues(feature_check_pool, mz_steps = c(44.02628),
                                   rt_min = 0.1, rt_max = 100, ppm_tolerance = 10, 
                                   min_series_length = 5, search_mode = "targeted", 
                                   step_mode = "increment", verbose = TRUE)

plotAnnotatedStatic(peak_table_PEG)
```



```{r}

sdb <- sdbCreate(peak_table_PEG, sample_origin = "data")


```
```{r}
# Remove untargeted 
peak_table_untargeted <- detectHomologues(feature_check_pool, mz_min = 10, mz_max = 50, 
                                          rt_min = 0.5, rt_max = 100, ppm_tolerance = 5, 
                                          min_series_length = 5, search_mode = "untargeted", 
                                          step_mode = "increment", verbose = TRUE) #rt_min 0.5 -> 0.2 mz_max 50 -> 100 # increment -> decrement (and combine )
```

# do not run just in case you might be interested in some of those compounds that are still present

```{r}
# FOR THE ANNOTATION OF PEGs
peak_table_untargeted <- detectHomologues(feature_check_pool, mz_min = 10, mz_max = 100, 
                                          rt_min = 0.2, rt_max = 200, ppm_tolerance = 5, 
                                          min_series_length = 5, search_mode = "untargeted", 
                                          step_mode = "decrement", verbose = TRUE) #rt_min 0.5 -> 0.2 mz_max 50 -> 100 # increment -> decrement (and combine )

a <- plotAnnotatedStatic(peak_table_untargeted)

```
```{r}
#if running targeted and untargeted 
# Combine tables
overlapping_ids <- sdbCheckContained(sdb, peak_table_untargeted, ppm_tolerance = 0.5, rt_tolerance = 0.5)
sdb <- sdbPush(sdb, filter(peak_table_untargeted, !(homologue_id %in% overlapping_ids)))
```


```{r}
sdb$sample_peak_id <- as.character(sdb$sample_peak_id)
features_contaminat <- info_feature_complete %>% dplyr::filter(Feature %in% sdb$sample_peak_id)

data_clean4 <- data_clean3 %>% dplyr::select(-c(sdb$sample_peak_id))
#data_clean3 <- data_clean2 %>% dplyr::select(-c(sdb$sample_peak_id))
```


```{r}
# Check one of the PEGs
#30108
#26921

peg <- data_final %>% dplyr::select(SampleID, `27183`) %>% left_join(metadata_final) 
colnames(peg)[2] <- "PEG"

peg %>% arrange(Order) %>% dplyr::mutate(LogPeg = log2(PEG+1)) %>%
  ggboxplot(x = "Sample_Type", y = "PEG", add = "jitter",
                  color = "Order", group = "Sample_Type", legend = "right") + scale_color_viridis_c()
```

```{r}

peg <- data_final_updated %>% dplyr::select(SampleID, `27183`) %>% left_join(metadata_final) 
colnames(peg)[2] <- "PEG"

peg %>% arrange(Order) %>% dplyr::mutate(LogPeg = log2(PEG+1)) %>%
  ggboxplot(x = "Sample_Type", y = "PEG", add = "jitter",
                  color = "Order", group = "Sample_Type", legend = "right") + scale_color_viridis_c()
```

```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/PEGboxplot_26921.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 11, height = 5, units = "in")
```
```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/PEGboxplot_26921.svg", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 11, height = 5, units = "in")
```

```{r}
# a is defined further 
# remove features with ID_cor=315

# Filter the column names to remove based on the condition
columns_to_remove <- a$names[a$Corr_ID == 315]

# Remove those columns from data_clean4 and save as data_clean5
data_clean5 <- data_clean4 %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(columns_to_remove))

```
```{r}
# a and b are defined further
# Filter the column names to remove based on the condition and remove any NA values
#columns_to_remove <- a$names[a$Corr_ID == 315]
#columns_to_remove <- columns_to_remove[!is.na(columns_to_remove)]


columns_to_remove <- info_feature_complete$Feature[info_feature_complete$Corr_ID == 315]
columns_to_remove <- columns_to_remove[!is.na(columns_to_remove)]

# Keep only the columns that exist in data_clean4
columns_to_remove <- columns_to_remove[columns_to_remove %in% colnames(data_clean4)]

# Remove those columns from data_clean4 and save as data_clean5
data_clean5 <- data_clean4 %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(columns_to_remove))



```

```{r}
#a and b are defined further
columns_to_remove <- info_feature_complete$Feature[info_feature_complete$Corr_ID == 403]
columns_to_remove <- columns_to_remove[!is.na(columns_to_remove)]

# Keep only the columns that exist in data_clean4
columns_to_remove <- columns_to_remove[columns_to_remove %in% colnames(data_clean5)]

# Remove those columns from data_clean4 and save as data_clean5
data_clean6 <- data_clean5 %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(columns_to_remove))
```

```{r}
# PCA
PCA_raw <- mixOmics::pca(data_clean4 %>% select_at(vars(-one_of(nearZeroVar(., names = TRUE)))) %>%
                           column_to_rownames("SampleID"), ncomp = 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)
PCA_raw_scores <- data.frame(PCA_raw$variates$X) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(metadata_final)

i <- "Sample_Type"

PCA_raw_plot <- PCA_raw_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, alpha = 0.6,
            title = paste("PCA - Skin Metabolome", i, sep = " "),
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_raw$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_raw$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  geom_point(data = PCA_raw_scores %>% group_by((!!sym(i))) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("PC")), mean), aes(PC1, PC2, color = (!!sym(i))), size = 4, shape = 8) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 4)) + coord_fixed()

```

```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/PCA_raw_HD.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in")
```
```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/PCA_raw_HD_filtered.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in")
```
```{r}
# Calculate Total Ion Count (TIC)
data_TIC_clean4 <- data.frame(TIC = rowSums(data_clean4 %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID"))) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(sample_order, by = c("SampleID" = "File.Name"))

```
```{r}
#Plots a scatter plot of the Order vs. TIC
data_TIC_clean4 %>% dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(SampleID, regex("Blank|6mix|Pool|wash|CTL|QC", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>%
  left_join(metadata_final) %>%
  ggscatter("Order", "TIC", color = "host_subject_id", add = "reg.line") +
  stat_cor()
```
```{r}
# Calculate Total Ion Count (TIC)
data_TIC_clean6 <- data.frame(TIC = rowSums(data_clean6 %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID"))) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(sample_order, by = c("SampleID" = "File.Name"))

```
```{r}
#Plots a scatter plot of the Order vs. TIC
data_TIC_clean6 %>% dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(SampleID, regex("Blank|6mix|Pool|wash|CTL|QC", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>%
  left_join(metadata_final) %>%
  ggscatter("Order", "TIC", color = "host_subject_id", add = "reg.line") +
  stat_cor()
```

```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/data_TIC_clean6.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in")
```

```{r}
  column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% 
  select_at(vars(-one_of(nearZeroVar(., names = TRUE)))) %>% rownames_to_column("SampleID")
```
