```{r}
# Assuming metadata_final contains SampleID and sample_name columns

# Replace SampleID with sample_name
data_sample_name <- data_clean3 %>% 
  dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(SampleID, regex("Blank|6mix|Pool|wash|CTL|QC", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(metadata_final %>% select(SampleID, sample_name), by = "SampleID") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(SampleID = sample_name) %>%
  dplyr::select(-sample_name) %>%
  column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% 
  select_at(vars(-one_of(nearZeroVar(., names = TRUE)))) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID")

```

```{r}

write_csv(x = data_sample_name, file = "../Data/metabolomics/Run3_10252024/data_sample_10282024.csv")
```

```{r}
# Replace SampleID with sample_name 09 29 2023
data_sample_name <- data_sample %>% 
  dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(SampleID, regex("Blank|6mix|Pool|wash|CTL|QC", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(metadata_final %>% select(SampleID, sample_name), by = "SampleID") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(SampleID = sample_name) %>%
  dplyr::select(-sample_name) %>%
  column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% 
  select_at(vars(-one_of(nearZeroVar(., names = TRUE)))) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID")
```

```{r}
write_csv(x = data_sample_name, file = "../output/quantwithoutblancs_09262024.csv")
```
```{r}
write_csv(x = data_sample_name, file = "../output/data_sample_09292024.csv")
```

```{r}
# Assuming 'data_sample' contains a column 'SampleID' and 'metadata_final' has 'SampleID' and 'Plate_Number'
# Step 1: Get the SampleIDs that have Plate_Number equal to 2
exclude_samples <- metadata_final %>%
  filter(Plate_Number == 2) %>%
  pull(SampleID)

# Step 2: Remove those SampleIDs from data_sample
data_sample_filtered <- data_sample %>%
  filter(!SampleID %in% exclude_samples)

# Now, 'data_sample_filtered' contains only the rows where SampleID is not from Plate 2
```
```{r}
# Filter out rows where Plate_Number is equal to 2
metadata_filtered <- metadata_final %>%
  filter(Plate_Number != 2)
```
```{r}
# Replace SampleID with sample_name
data_sample_name <- data_sample_filtered %>% 
  dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(SampleID, regex("Blank|6mix|Pool|wash|CTL|QC", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(metadata_filtered %>% select(SampleID, sample_name), by = "SampleID") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(SampleID = sample_name) %>%
  dplyr::select(-sample_name) %>%
  column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% 
  select_at(vars(-one_of(nearZeroVar(., names = TRUE)))) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID")
```


```{r}
write_csv(x = metadata_filtered, file = "../output/metadata_filtered_09292024.csv")
```
```{r}
write_csv(x = metadata_final, file = "../output/metadata_09262024.csv")
```

```{r}
write_csv(x = data_sample_name, file = "../output/data_sample_filtered_09292024.csv")
```

```{r}
data_sample <- data_sample_filtered
```

```{r}
# RCLR transformation
data_sample_clr <- decostand(data_sample %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID"), method = "rclr")
```


```{r}
# PCA
PCA_whole <- mixOmics::pca(data_sample_clr, ncomp = 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)
PCA_whole_scores <- data.frame(PCA_whole$variates$X) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(metadata_final)
PCA_whole_scores$category_label <- factor(PCA_whole_scores$category_label, levels = c("Healthy", "Acne Lesional", "Acne Non-lesional"))

i <- "category_label"

PCA_plot <- PCA_whole_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, alpha = 0.6,
            title = paste("PCA - group"),
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  geom_point(data = PCA_whole_scores %>% group_by((!!sym(i))) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("PC")), mean), aes(PC1, PC2, color = (!!sym(i))), size = 4, shape = 8) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 4)) + coord_fixed() + scale_color_viridis_d()

```
```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/PCA_category_label_data_removaloutliersPC1.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in")
```



```{r}
# Identify SampleIDs with PC1 > 10
outlier_sample_ids <- PCA_whole_scores %>%
  filter(PC1 > 10) %>%
  pull(SampleID)

# Display the outlier SampleIDs
print(outlier_sample_ids)

# Exclude these samples from data_sample_clr
data_sample_clr_filtered <- data_sample_clr[!rownames(data_sample_clr) %in% outlier_sample_ids, ]
```

```{r}
# Check if all outlier IDs are present in both datasets
all(outlier_sample_ids %in% rownames(data_sample))
all(outlier_sample_ids %in% rownames(data_sample_clr))

```

```{r}
# Filter data_sample based on SampleID column
data_sample_filtered <- data_sample %>%
  filter(!SampleID %in% outlier_sample_ids)

```

```{r}
# Filter data_sample based on SampleID column
data_sample_method2 <- data_sample %>%
  filter(!SampleID %in% outlier_sample_ids)
```



```{r}
# not a step for the filtering of the data
#create csv with all features and no filtering! 
# Filter data_sample based on SampleID column
data_sample_filtered <- data_final_updated %>%
  filter(!SampleID %in% outlier_sample_ids)

# Replace SampleID with sample_name
data_sample_name <- data_sample_filtered %>% 
  dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(SampleID, regex("Blank|6mix|Pool|wash|CTL|QC", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(metadata_final %>% select(SampleID, sample_name), by = "SampleID") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(SampleID = sample_name) %>%
  dplyr::select(-sample_name) %>%
  column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% 
  select_at(vars(-one_of(nearZeroVar(., names = TRUE)))) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID")

write_csv(x = data_sample_name, file = "../Data/metabolomics/Run3_10252024/raw_data_11252024.csv")
```


```{r}
# RCLR transformation
data_sample_clr <- decostand(data_sample_filtered %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID"), method = "rclr")
```

#decostand runs into errors otherwise
```{r}
# Identify columns with zero variance
zero_variance_cols <- which(apply(data_sample_clr, 2, var) == 0)

# Remove columns with zero variance
data_sample_clr <- data_sample_clr[, -zero_variance_cols]

```

```{r}
# PCA
PCA_whole <- mixOmics::pca(data_sample_clr, ncomp = 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)
PCA_whole_scores <- data.frame(PCA_whole$variates$X) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(metadata_final)
PCA_whole_scores$Plate_Number <- factor(PCA_whole_scores$Plate_Number, levels = c("1","2", "3", "4"))

i <- "Plate_Number"

PCA_plot <- PCA_whole_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, alpha = 0.6,
            title = paste("PCA - Plate_Number"),
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  geom_point(data = PCA_whole_scores %>% group_by((!!sym(i))) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("PC")), mean), aes(PC1, PC2, color = (!!sym(i))), size = 4, shape = 8) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 4)) + coord_fixed() + scale_color_viridis_d()
```
```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/PCA_Plate_Number.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in")
```


```{r}
# PCA
PCA_whole <- mixOmics::pca(data_sample_clr, ncomp = 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)
PCA_whole_scores <- data.frame(PCA_whole$variates$X) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(metadata_final)

i <- "host_subject_id"

PCA_plot <- PCA_whole_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, alpha = 0.6,
            title = paste("PCA - host subject ID"),
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  geom_point(data = PCA_whole_scores %>% group_by((!!sym(i))) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("PC")), mean), aes(PC1, PC2, color = (!!sym(i))), size = 4, shape = 8) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 4)) + coord_fixed() #+ scale_color_viridis_d()
```

```{r}
# Install and load RColorBrewer if needed
if (!requireNamespace("RColorBrewer", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("RColorBrewer")
}
library(RColorBrewer)

# Generate a color palette with more than 20 colors (for example, 30 colors)
num_colors <- length(unique(PCA_whole_scores[[i]])) # Dynamic based on unique host subject IDs
palette <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(num_colors)

PCA_plot <- PCA_whole_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, alpha = 0.6,
            title = paste("PCA - host subject ID"),
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  geom_point(data = PCA_whole_scores %>% group_by((!!sym(i))) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("PC")), mean), aes(PC1, PC2, color = (!!sym(i))), size = 4, shape = 8) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 4)) + 
  coord_fixed() +
  scale_color_manual(values = palette)

```

```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/qc/PCA_host_subject_ID.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in")
```


```{r}
a <- mixOmics::plotVar(PCA_whole, cutoff = 0.5, plot = FALSE) %>% 
  left_join(info_feature_complete, by = c("names" = "Feature"))

```
```{r}
b <- mixOmics::plotVar(PCA_whole, cutoff = 0.5, plot = FALSE) %>% 
  left_join(info_feature_complete, by = c("names" = "Feature"))
```

```{r}
c <- mixOmics::plotVar(PCA_whole, cutoff = 0.5, plot = FALSE) %>% 
  left_join(info_feature_complete, by = c("names" = "Feature"))
```

```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/PCA_plot_group_filtered.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 5, units = "in")
```

```{r}
# Assuming `data_tic_filtered` contains `SampleID` and `TIC` columns
PCA_whole_scores <- PCA_whole_scores %>%
  left_join(data_tic_filtered, by = "SampleID")  # Join TIC data by SampleID

# Plot with continuous color scale for TIC
PCA_plot <- PCA_whole_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = "TIC.x", alpha = 0.6,
            title = paste("PCA - TIC"),
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 4)) + 
  coord_fixed() + 
  scale_color_viridis_c()  # Use continuous color scale for TIC

# Display the plot
PCA_plot

```
```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/PCA_plot_TIC.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 5, units = "in")
```
```{r}
#Excluding means
i <- "host_subject_id"
j <- "category_label"

PCA_plot_2 <- PCA_whole_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, shape = j, alpha = 0.6,
            title = paste("PCA - Skin Metabolic Profiles Acne lesional and non-lesional vs Healthy "),
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 4)) + coord_fixed()

```
```{r}
ggsave("../figures/PCA_plot_group_subjectID.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 8, units = "in")
```

```{r}
#including means 
i <- "host_subject_id"
j <- "category_label"

PCA_plot_2 <- PCA_whole_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, shape = j, alpha = 0.6,
            title = paste("PCA - Skin Metabolic Profiles Acne lesional and non-lesional vs Healthy "),
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_whole$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  geom_point(data = PCA_whole_scores %>% group_by((!!sym(i))) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("PC")), mean), aes(PC1, PC2, color = (!!sym(i))), size = 4, shape = 8) + 
  # Remove color aesthetic from the grouping mean points
  geom_point(data = PCA_whole_scores %>% group_by((!!sym(j))) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("PC")), mean), aes(PC1, PC2), size = 4, shape = 8) +  # Shape only
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 4)) + coord_fixed()

```

```{r}
# PERMANOVA
dist_metabolites <- vegdist(data_sample_clr, method = "euclidean")
disper_donor <- betadisper(dist_metabolites, PCA_whole_scores$host_subject_id)

#significant variation between the groups
anova(disper_donor)
permanova <- adonis2(dist_metabolites ~ PCA_whole_scores$host_subject_id + PCA_whole_scores$category_label, PCA_whole_scores, na.action = na.omit)

```

```{r}
data_sample <- data_sample_filtered
```

```{r}
data_sample <- data_sample_method1
```
```{r}
data_sample <- data_sample_method2
```
#ACNE_L vs Healthy


```{r}
# Acne_L vs Healthy
sample_LvsH <- metadata_final %>% 
  dplyr::filter(category_label == "Acne Lesional" | category_label == "Healthy")

data_LvsH <- data_sample %>% 
  dplyr::filter(SampleID %in% sample_LvsH$SampleID) %>% 
  column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% 
  select_at(vars(-one_of(nearZeroVar(., names = TRUE)))) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID")
```

```{r}
# RCLR transformation
data_LvsH_clr <- decostand(data_LvsH %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID"), method = "rclr")

```


```{r}
# PCA
PCA_LvsH <- mixOmics::pca(data_LvsH_clr, ncomp = 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)
PCA_LvsH_scores <- data.frame(PCA_LvsH$variates$X) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(metadata_final)
```

```{r}
i <- "category_label"

PCA_LvsH_plot <- PCA_LvsH_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, alpha = 0.6,
            title = paste("PCA - Acne Lesional vs Healthy "), palette = "npg",
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_LvsH$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_LvsH$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  geom_point(data = PCA_LvsH_scores %>% group_by((!!sym(i))) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("PC")), mean), aes(PC1, PC2, color = (!!sym(i))), size = 4, shape = 8) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 4)) + coord_fixed()
```


```{r}
#custom_colors <- c("#df7963", "#67b2be", "#423fa6") 
i <- "category_label"
#"#a54700", "#008080"

PCA_LvsH_plot <- PCA_LvsH_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, alpha = 0.6,
            title = paste("PCA - Acne Lesional vs Healthy "), palette = c("#dd7963", "#423fa6"),
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_LvsH$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_LvsH$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),legend.title = "Cohort",
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  geom_point(data = PCA_LvsH_scores %>% group_by((!!sym(i))) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("PC")), mean), aes(PC1, PC2, color = category_label), size = 4, shape = 8) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 4)) + coord_fixed()
```

```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/PCA_plot_Acne_LvsHealthy.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in")
```

```{r}
#Permanova 
dist_metabolites <- vegdist(data_LvsH_clr, method = "euclidean")
disper_group <- betadisper(dist_metabolites, PCA_LvsH_scores$category_label)
anova(disper_group)
permanova <- adonis2(dist_metabolites ~ PCA_LvsH_scores$host_subject_id + PCA_LvsH_scores$category_label, PCA_LvsH_scores, na.action = na.omit)

permanova <- adonis2(dist_metabolites ~ PCA_LvsH_scores$host_subject_id + PCA_LvsH_scores$category_label, PCA_LvsH_scores, na.action = na.omit)
```

```{r}
permanova <- adonis2(dist_metabolites ~ PCA_LvsH_scores$host_subject_id + PCA_LvsH_scores$category_label, 
                     data = PCA_LvsH_scores, 
                     na.action = na.omit, 
                     by = "margin")

```

```{r}
# Effect of category_label
adonis2(dist_metabolites ~ PCA_LvsH_scores$category_label, data = PCA_LvsH_scores, na.action = na.omit)

# Effect of host_subject_id
adonis2(dist_metabolites ~ PCA_LvsH_scores$host_subject_id, data = PCA_LvsH_scores, na.action = na.omit)

```


#The subject-specific differences (likely individual biological variability) are driving the majority of the variation in metabolite distances.
#The grouping factor (Lesional vs Healthy) doesn't explain additional variation when individual differences are already considered.
```{r}
# PLSDA
PLSDA_LvsH <- mixOmics::plsda(data_LvsH_clr, PCA_LvsH_scores$category_label, ncomp = 2, scale = TRUE)
PLSDA_LvsH_scores <- data.frame(PLSDA_LvsH$variates$X) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(metadata_final)

PLSDA_LvsH_plot <- PLSDA_LvsH_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "comp1", y = "comp2", color = "category_label", alpha = 0.6, title = "PLS-DA - Acne Lesional vs Healthy", 
            xlab = paste("Component 1 (", round(PLSDA_LvsH$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("Component 2 (", round(PLSDA_LvsH$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            legend.title = "Cohort", ggtheme = theme_classic(), palette = c("#dd7963", "#423fa6")) +
  geom_point(data = PLSDA_LvsH_scores %>% group_by(category_label) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("comp")), mean), aes(comp1, comp2, color = category_label), size = 3, shape = 8) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10),axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 5)) + coord_fixed()
```


```{r}
# PLSDA
PLSDA_LvsH <- mixOmics::plsda(data_LvsH_clr, PCA_LvsH_scores$category_label, ncomp = 2, scale = TRUE)
PLSDA_LvsH_scores <- data.frame(PLSDA_LvsH$variates$X) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(metadata_final)

PLSDA_LvsH_plot <- PLSDA_LvsH_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "comp1", y = "comp2", color = "category_label", alpha = 0.6, title = "PLS-DA - Acne Lesional vs Healthy", 
            xlab = paste("Component 1 (", round(PLSDA_LvsH$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("Component 2 (", round(PLSDA_LvsH$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            legend.title = "Cohort", ggtheme = theme_classic(), palette = c("#dd7963", "#423fa6")) +
  geom_point(data = PLSDA_LvsH_scores %>% group_by(category_label) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("comp")), mean), aes(comp1, comp2, color = category_label), size = 3, shape = 8) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10),axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 5)) + coord_fixed()
```

#palette = c("#F8766D", "#619CFF"))

```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/PLSDA_plot_Acne_LvsHealthy.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in")
```
```{r}
Loadings_LvsH <- plotLoadings(PLSDA_LvsH, contrib = "max") %>%
  as.data.frame(check.names = FALSE) %>%
  rownames_to_column()
```



```{r}
# Dynamically remove 'X.' prefix if it exists
colnames(Loadings_LvsH) <- gsub("^X\\.", "", colnames(Loadings_LvsH))

# Now, select the columns of interest
Loadings_LvsH <- Loadings_LvsH %>%
  dplyr::select(rowname, GroupContrib, importance)

perf_PLSDA_LvsH <- perf(PLSDA_LvsH, validation = "Mfold", folds =5) #perform M-fold or loo
plot(perf_PLSDA_LvsH, legend = FALSE)
```
```{r}
# ! note that the function perf should be rerun several times and the error # rates obtained below should then be averaged
perf_PLSDA_LvsH1 <- perf(PLSDA_LvsH, validation = "Mfold", folds =5, progressBar = FALSE) #perform M-fold or loo
perf_PLSDA_LvsH1$error.rate
```

```{r}
set.seed(123) # For reproducibility
repeats <- 10 # Number of repetitions

# Initialize a list to store error rates from each repetition
overall_error_rates <- list()

# Repeat the `perf` function 5 times and store results
for (i in 1:repeats) {
  perf_PLSDA_LvsH1 <- perf(PLSDA_LvsH, validation = "Mfold", folds = 5, progressBar = FALSE)
  overall_error_rates[[i]] <- perf_PLSDA_LvsH1$error.rate$overall
}

max_dist_errors <- sapply(overall_error_rates, function(x) x[, "max.dist"])

# Calculate the average error rate for `max.dist` across repetitions
avg_max_dist <- rowMeans(max_dist_errors)

# Display the average error rate for each component
print(avg_max_dist)
```





```{r}
VIPs_LvsH <- as.data.frame(mixOmics::vip(PLSDA_LvsH))
VIPs_LvsH_filter <- dplyr::filter(VIPs_LvsH, VIPs_LvsH$comp1 > 1) # larger than 1 is seen as an important component
VIPs_LvsH_filter$ID <- rownames(VIPs_LvsH_filter)
VIPs_LvsH_select <- VIPs_LvsH_filter %>% dplyr::select(ID, comp1)
VIPs_LvsH_Load <- VIPs_LvsH_select %>% 
  left_join(Loadings_LvsH, by = c("ID" = "rowname")) %>% arrange(desc(comp1)) %>%
  left_join(info_feature_complete, by = c("ID" = "Feature")) %>% dplyr::select(1:8)
```
```{r}
write_csv(x = VIPs_LvsH_Load, file = "../Output/VIPs_LvsH_Load_data_method2_11212024.csv")
```


```{r}
write_csv(x = VIPs_LvsH_Load, file = "../Output/VIPs_LvsH_Load_data_clean6_12072024.csv")
```

```{r}
skin_Acne_L <- VIPs_LvsH_Load %>% dplyr::filter(GroupContrib == "Acne Lesional") 
skin_Healthy <- VIPs_LvsH_Load %>% dplyr::filter(GroupContrib == "Healthy") 
```

```{r}
data_hfhc <- data_sample %>%
  dplyr::select("SampleID", skin_Acne_L$ID, skin_Healthy$ID) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Healthy = rowSums(select(., skin_Healthy$ID))) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Acne_L = rowSums(select(., skin_Acne_L$ID))) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Ratio = log(Acne_L/Healthy)) %>%
  left_join(metadata_final) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group = factor(category_label, levels = c("Healthy", "Acne Lesional", "Acne Non-lesional")))

```

```{r}
# Calculate the mean per group and age
df_mean <- data_hfhc %>%
  group_by(category_label, acne_severity) %>%
  summarise(Mean_Measurement = mean(Ratio))
```


```{r}
# "#008080", "#a54700", "#c49c6b"
# Plot
ratio_hfhc_plot <- ggplot(data_hfhc, aes(x = acne_severity, y = Ratio,)) +
  geom_line(aes(alpha = 0.3, colour = category_label, group = host_subject_id), linewidth = 0.3) +  # Thin lines for individual mice
  geom_line(data = df_mean, aes(x = acne_severity, y = Mean_Measurement, color = category_label), 
            linewidth = 2.5) +  # Thick lines for the mean
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#dd7966","#6ab2bd", "#58a35b")) +  # Customize colors if needed
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Local Lesion Severity", y = "Ratio") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```



```{r}

data_hfhc_plot <- data_hfhc %>% 
  ggboxplot(x = "category_label", y = "Ratio", legend = "none",
            title = "Driving Metabolic Features", 
            ylab = "Ratio (Top Acne_L/Top Healthy)", xlab = FALSE,
            add = "jitter", palette = c("#423fa6", "#dd7963", "#67b2be"),
            add.params = list(color = "category_label", alpha = 0.6)) + 
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("Acne Lesional", "Healthy"), c("Acne Lesional", "Acne Non-lesional"),
                                        c("Healthy", "Acne Non-lesional")), label = "p.signif") + 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), 
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8), # Ensure x-axis text is visible and not blank
        axis.ticks.x = element_line())        # Ensure x-axis ticks are visible
anova <- aov(Ratio ~ category_label, data_hfhc)
tukey_hsd(anova)
```
```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/boxplot_method1_ratioAcne_LvsHealthy.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 6, height = 4, units = "in")
```


```{r}
# Generate Upset plot to check metabolic features recovered by the different groups
data_LvsH_presence <- data_LvsH %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID")

data_LvsH_presence[data_LvsH_presence > 0] <- 1
data_LvsH_presence_info <- data_LvsH_presence %>% rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% 
  left_join(metadata_final %>% dplyr::select(SampleID, category_label)) %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID")

list_LvsH <- list(`Lesional` = data_LvsH_presence_info %>% dplyr::filter(category_label == "Acne Lesional") %>% 
                    dplyr::select(-category_label) %>% select(where(~sum(.) >= 1)) %>% colnames(),
                  `Healthy` = data_LvsH_presence_info %>% dplyr::filter(category_label == "Healthy") %>% 
                    dplyr::select(-category_label) %>% select(where(~sum(.) >= 1)) %>% colnames())

upset_LvsH <- upset(fromList(list_LvsH), order.by = "freq")
```


```{r}
png("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/upset_LvsH.png", width = 10, height = 10, units = "in", res = 300)
print(upset_LvsH)
dev.off()


```

```{r}
list_LvsH_method1 <- list(
  `Lesional` = VIPs_LvsH_Load %>%
    filter(GroupContrib == "Acne Lesional") %>%
    pull(ID), # Extract the IDs of features enriched in Lesional
  
  `Healthy` = VIPs_LvsH_Load %>%
    filter(GroupContrib == "Healthy") %>%
    pull(ID)  # Extract the IDs of features enriched in Healthy
)
upset_LvsH_method1 <- upset(fromList(list_LvsH_method1), order.by = "freq")
```



write_csv(x = metadata_final, file = "../output/metadata_09262024.csv")

#ACNE_NL vs Healthy
```{r}
# Acne_NL vs Healthy
sample_NLvsH <- metadata_final %>% 
  dplyr::filter(category_label == "Acne Non-lesional" | category_label == "Healthy")

data_NLvsH <- data_sample %>% 
  dplyr::filter(SampleID %in% sample_NLvsH$SampleID) %>% 
  column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% 
  select_at(vars(-one_of(nearZeroVar(., names = TRUE)))) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID")
```

```{r}
# RCLR transformation
data_NLvsH_clr <- decostand(data_NLvsH %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID"), method = "rclr")

```


```{r}
# PCA
PCA_NLvsH <- mixOmics::pca(data_NLvsH_clr, ncomp = 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)
PCA_NLvsH_scores <- data.frame(PCA_NLvsH$variates$X) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(metadata_final)
```

```{r}
i <- "category_label"

PCA_NLvsH_plot <- PCA_NLvsH_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, alpha = 0.6,
            title = paste("PCA - Acne Non-Lesional vs Healthy "), palette = "npg",
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_NLvsH$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_NLvsH$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  geom_point(data = PCA_NLvsH_scores %>% group_by((!!sym(i))) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("PC")), mean), aes(PC1, PC2, color = (!!sym(i))), size = 4, shape = 8) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 4)) + coord_fixed()
```

```{r}
i <- "category_label"
#"#c49c6b", "#008080"
#custom_colors <- c("#df7963", "#67b2be", "#423fa6") 
PCA_NLvsH_plot <- PCA_NLvsH_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, alpha = 0.6,
            title = paste("PCA - Acne Non-Lesional vs Healthy "), palette = c("#67b2be", "#423fa6"),
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_NLvsH$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_NLvsH$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            , legend.title = "Cohort", ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  geom_point(data = PCA_NLvsH_scores %>% group_by(category_label) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("PC")), mean), aes(PC1, PC2, color = category_label), size = 4, shape = 8) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 4)) + coord_fixed()
```

```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/PCA_plot_Acne_NLvsHealthy.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in")
```

```{r}
#Permanova 
dist_metabolites <- vegdist(data_NLvsH_clr, method = "euclidean")
disper_group <- betadisper(dist_metabolites, PCA_NLvsH_scores$category_label)
anova(disper_group)
permanova <- adonis2(dist_metabolites ~ PCA_NLvsH_scores$host_subject_id + PCA_NLvsH_scores$category_label, PCA_NLvsH_scores, na.action = na.omit)

```
```{r}
permanova <- adonis2(dist_metabolites ~ PCA_NLvsH_scores$host_subject_id + PCA_NLvsH_scores$category_label, 
                     data = PCA_NLvsH_scores, 
                     na.action = na.omit, 
                     by = "margin")
```

```{r}
# PLSDA
#"#c49c6b", "#008080"
PLSDA_NLvsH <- mixOmics::plsda(data_NLvsH_clr, PCA_NLvsH_scores$category_label, ncomp = 2, scale = TRUE)
PLSDA_NLvsH_scores <- data.frame(PLSDA_NLvsH$variates$X) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(metadata_final)

PLSDA_NLvsH_plot <- PLSDA_NLvsH_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "comp1", y = "comp2", color = "category_label", alpha = 0.6, title = "PLS-DA - Acne Non-Lesional vs Healthy", 
            xlab = paste("Component 1 (", round(PLSDA_NLvsH$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("Component 2 (", round(PLSDA_NLvsH$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            legend.title = "Cohort", ggtheme = theme_classic(), palette = c("#67b2be", "#423fa6")) +
  geom_point(data = PLSDA_NLvsH_scores %>% group_by(category_label) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("comp")), mean), aes(comp1, comp2, color = category_label), size = 3, shape = 8) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10),axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 5)) + coord_fixed()
```


#palette = c("#F8766D", "#619CFF"))

```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/PLSDA_plot_Acne_NLvsHealthy.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in")
```
```{r}

Loadings_NLvsH <- plotLoadings(PLSDA_NLvsH, contrib = "max") %>%
  as.data.frame(check.names = FALSE) %>%
  rownames_to_column()

# Dynamically remove 'X.' prefix if it exists
colnames(Loadings_NLvsH) <- gsub("^X\\.", "", colnames(Loadings_NLvsH))

# Now, select the columns of interest
Loadings_NLvsH <- Loadings_NLvsH %>%
  dplyr::select(rowname, GroupContrib, importance)

perf_PLSDA_NLvsH <- perf(PLSDA_NLvsH, validation = "Mfold", folds = 5 ) #perform M-fold or loo
plot(perf_PLSDA_NLvsH, legend = FALSE)

VIPs_NLvsH <- as.data.frame(mixOmics::vip(PLSDA_NLvsH))
VIPs_NLvsH_filter <- dplyr::filter(VIPs_NLvsH, VIPs_NLvsH$comp1 > 1) # larger than 1 is seen as an important component
VIPs_NLvsH_filter$ID <- rownames(VIPs_NLvsH_filter)
VIPs_NLvsH_select <- VIPs_NLvsH_filter %>% dplyr::select(ID, comp1)
VIPs_NLvsH_Load <- VIPs_NLvsH_select %>% 
  left_join(Loadings_NLvsH, by = c("ID" = "rowname")) %>% arrange(desc(comp1)) %>%
  left_join(info_feature_complete, by = c("ID" = "Feature")) %>% dplyr::select(1:8)
```

```{r}
set.seed(123) # For reproducibility
repeats <- 10 # Number of repetitions

# Initialize a list to store error rates from each repetition
overall_error_rates <- list()

# Repeat the `perf` function 5 times and store results
for (i in 1:repeats) {
  perf_PLSDA_NLvsH1 <- perf(PLSDA_NLvsH, validation = "Mfold", folds = 5, progressBar = FALSE)
  overall_error_rates[[i]] <- perf_PLSDA_NLvsH1$error.rate$overall
}

max_dist_errors_NLvsH <- sapply(overall_error_rates, function(x) x[, "max.dist"])

# Calculate the average error rate for `max.dist` across repetitions
avg_max_dist_NLvsH <- rowMeans(max_dist_errors_NLvsH)

# Display the average error rate for each component
print(avg_max_dist_NLvsH)
```
```{r}
write_csv(x = VIPs_NLvsH_Load, file = "../Output/VIPs_NLvsH_Load_data_method2_11212024.csv")
```


```{r}
write_csv(x = VIPs_NLvsH_Load, file = "../Output/VIPs_NLvsH_Load_data_clean6_12072024.csv")
```

```{r}
skin_Acne_NL <- VIPs_NLvsH_Load %>% dplyr::filter(GroupContrib == "Acne Non-lesional") 
skin_NL_Healthy <- VIPs_NLvsH_Load %>% dplyr::filter(GroupContrib == "Healthy") 
```

```{r}
data_NLH <- data_sample %>%
  dplyr::select("SampleID", skin_Acne_NL$ID, skin_NL_Healthy$ID) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Healthy = rowSums(select(., skin_NL_Healthy$ID))) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Acne_NL = rowSums(select(., skin_Acne_NL$ID))) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Ratio = log(Acne_NL/Healthy)) %>%
  left_join(metadata_final) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group = factor(category_label, levels = c("Healthy", "Acne Lesional", "Acne Non-lesional")))

```
```{r}

data_NLH_plot <- data_NLH %>% 
  ggboxplot(x = "category_label", y = "Ratio", legend = "none",
            title = "Driving Metabolic Features", 
            ylab = "Ratio (Top Acne_NL/Top Healthy)", xlab = FALSE,
            add = "jitter", palette = c("#423fa6", "#dd7963", "#67b2be"),
            add.params = list(color = "category_label", alpha = 0.6)) + 
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("Acne Lesional", "Healthy"), c("Acne Lesional", "Acne Non-lesional"),
                                        c("Healthy", "Acne Non-lesional")), label = "p.signif") + 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), 
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8), # Ensure x-axis text is visible and not blank
        axis.ticks.x = element_line())        # Ensure x-axis ticks are visible
anova <- aov(Ratio ~ category_label, data_NLH)
tukey_hsd(anova)
```


```{r}
data_LNLH <- data_sample %>%
  dplyr::select("SampleID", skin_Acne_NL$ID, skin_NL_Healthy$ID, skin_Acne_L$ID) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Healthy = rowSums(select(., skin_NL_Healthy$ID))) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Acne_NL = rowSums(select(., skin_Acne_NL$ID))) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Acne_L = rowSums(select(., skin_Acne_L$ID))) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Ratio = log((Acne_L+Acne_NL)/Healthy)) %>%
  left_join(metadata_final) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group = factor(category_label, levels = c("Healthy", "Acne Lesional", "Acne Non-lesional")))
```
```{r}
data_LNLH$category_label <- factor(data_LNLH$category_label, 
                                   levels = c("Healthy", "Acne Lesional", "Acne Non-lesional"))

```

```{r}
counts <- data_LNLH %>%
  group_by(category_label) %>%
  summarize(n = n()) %>%
  mutate(label_with_count = paste0(category_label, "\n(n=", n, ")"))

```
```{r}
data_LNLH_plot <- data_LNLH %>% 
  ggboxplot(x = "category_label", y = "Ratio", legend = "none",
            title = "Driving Metabolic Features", 
            ylab = "Ratio ((Top Acne_L+ Top Acne_NL)/Top Healthy)", xlab = FALSE,
            add = "jitter", palette = c("#423fa6", "#dd7963", "#67b2be"),
            add.params = list(color = "category_label", alpha = 0.6)) + 
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("Acne Lesional", "Healthy"), c("Acne Lesional", "Acne Non-lesional"),
                                        c("Healthy", "Acne Non-lesional")), label = "p.signif", method="wilcox.test") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = counts$label_with_count) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), 
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8), # Ensure x-axis text is visible and not blank
        axis.ticks.x = element_line())        # Ensure x-axis ticks are visible
anova <- aov(Ratio ~ category_label, data_NLH)
tukey_hsd(anova)
```
```{r}
library(lme4)
library(emmeans)

# Fit a mixed-effects model with host_subject_id as a random effect
model <- lmer(Ratio ~ category_label + (1 | host_subject_id), data = data_LNLH)

# Perform post hoc pairwise comparisons with Tukey correction
posthoc <- emmeans(model, pairwise ~ category_label, adjust = "tukey")
summary(posthoc)
```
```{r}
# Extract pairwise comparison results
pairwise_results <- as.data.frame(posthoc$contrasts)

# Remove brackets around group names
pairwise_results <- pairwise_results %>%
  mutate(contrast = gsub("[()]", "", contrast))
```
```{r}
pairwise_results <- pairwise_results %>%
  mutate(p.adj.signif = case_when(
    p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
    p.value < 0.01 ~ "**",
    p.value < 0.05 ~ "*",
    TRUE ~ "ns"
  ))
```
```{r}
library(tidyr)

# Split the contrast column into group1 and group2
pairwise_results <- pairwise_results %>%
  separate(contrast, into = c("group1", "group2"), sep = " - ")

```


```{r}
ggboxplot(data_LNLH, 
          x = "category_label", 
          y = "Ratio", 
          add = "jitter", 
          ylab = "Ratio ((Top Acne_L+ Top Acne_NL)/Top Healthy)",
          xlab = FALSE,
          fill = "category_label",  # Map category_label to fill aesthetic
          palette = c("#423fa6", "#dd7963", "#67b2be"),  # Set palette
          add.params = list(color = "category_label", alpha = 0.6), legend ="none")  +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = counts$label_with_count) +
  stat_pvalue_manual(data = pairwise_results, 
                     label = "p.adj.signif", 
                     y.position = c(3.7, 4, 4.3)) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), 
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8))


```








```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/boxplot_method1_ratioAcne_L+NLvsHealthy.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 6, height = 4, units = "in")
```


```{r}
list_NLvsH_method1 <- list(
  `Non-lesional` = VIPs_NLvsH_Load %>%
    filter(GroupContrib == "Acne Non-lesional") %>%
    pull(ID), # Extract the IDs of features enriched in Lesional
  
  `Healthy` = VIPs_NLvsH_Load %>%
    filter(GroupContrib == "Healthy") %>%
    pull(ID)  # Extract the IDs of features enriched in Healthy
)
upset_NLvsH_method1 <- upset(fromList(list_NLvsH_method1), order.by = "freq")

```

#ACNE_NL vs Acne_L
```{r}
# Acne_NL vs Acne_L
sample_NLvsL <- metadata_final %>% 
  dplyr::filter(category_label == "Acne Non-lesional" | category_label == "Acne Lesional")

data_NLvsL <- data_sample %>% 
  dplyr::filter(SampleID %in% sample_NLvsL$SampleID) %>% 
  column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% 
  select_at(vars(-one_of(nearZeroVar(., names = TRUE)))) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID")
```

```{r}
# RCLR transformation
data_NLvsL_clr <- decostand(data_NLvsL %>% column_to_rownames("SampleID"), method = "rclr")

```


```{r}
# PCA
PCA_NLvsL <- mixOmics::pca(data_NLvsL_clr, ncomp = 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)
PCA_NLvsL_scores <- data.frame(PCA_NLvsL$variates$X) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(metadata_final)
```

```{r}
i <- "category_label"

PCA_NLvsL_plot <- PCA_NLvsL_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, alpha = 0.6,
            title = paste("PCA - Acne Non-Lesional vs Lesional "), palette = "npg",
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_NLvsL$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_NLvsL$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  geom_point(data = PCA_NLvsL_scores %>% group_by((!!sym(i))) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("PC")), mean), aes(PC1, PC2, color = (!!sym(i))), size = 4, shape = 8) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 4)) + coord_fixed()
```

```{r}
#custom_colors <- c("#df7963", "#67b2be", "#423fa6") 
i <- "category_label"
#"#58a35b", "#dd7966", "#6ab2bd"
#"#a54700","#c49c6b"
PCA_NLvsL_plot <- PCA_NLvsL_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = i, alpha = 0.6,
            title = paste("PCA - Acne Non-Lesional vs Lesional "), palette = c("#df7963","#67b2be"),
            xlab = paste("PC1 (", round(PCA_NLvsL$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("PC2 (", round(PCA_NLvsL$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            legend.title = "Cohort", ggtheme = theme_classic()) +
  geom_point(data = PCA_NLvsL_scores %>% group_by(category_label) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("PC")), mean), aes(PC1, PC2, color = category_label), size = 4, shape = 8) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 4)) + coord_fixed()
```

```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/PCA_plot_Acne_NLvsL.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in")
```

```{r}
#Permanova 
dist_metabolites <- vegdist(data_NLvsL_clr, method = "euclidean")
disper_group <- betadisper(dist_metabolites, PCA_NLvsL_scores$category_label)
anova(disper_group)
permanova <- adonis2(dist_metabolites ~ PCA_NLvsL_scores$host_subject_id + PCA_NLvsL_scores$category_label, PCA_NLvsL_scores, na.action = na.omit)

```
```{r}
permanova <- adonis2(dist_metabolites ~ PCA_NLvsL_scores$host_subject_id + PCA_NLvsL_scores$category_label, 
                     data = PCA_NLvsL_scores, 
                     na.action = na.omit, 
                     by = "margin")
```

```{r}
# PLSDA
PLSDA_NLvsL <- mixOmics::plsda(data_NLvsL_clr, PCA_NLvsL_scores$category_label, ncomp = 2, scale = TRUE)
PLSDA_NLvsL_scores <- data.frame(PLSDA_NLvsL$variates$X) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(metadata_final)

PLSDA_NLvsL_plot <- PLSDA_NLvsL_scores %>%
  ggscatter(x = "comp1", y = "comp2", color = "category_label", alpha = 0.6, title = "PLS-DA - Acne Non-Lesional vs Lesional", 
            xlab = paste("Component 1 (", round(PLSDA_NLvsL$prop_expl_var$X[1]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""), 
            ylab = paste("Component 2 (", round(PLSDA_NLvsL$prop_expl_var$X[2]*100, digits = 1),"%)", sep = ""),
            legend.title = "Cohort", ggtheme = theme_classic(), palette = c("#df7963","#67b2be")) +
  geom_point(data = PLSDA_NLvsL_scores %>% group_by(category_label) %>% 
               summarise_at(vars(matches("comp")), mean), aes(comp1, comp2, color = category_label), size = 3, shape = 8) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10),axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 5)) + coord_fixed()
```


#palette = c("#F8766D", "#619CFF"))

```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/PLSDA_plot_Acne_NLvsL.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in")
```
```{r}

Loadings_NLvsL <- plotLoadings(PLSDA_NLvsL, contrib = "max") %>%
  as.data.frame(check.names = FALSE) %>%
  rownames_to_column()

# Dynamically remove 'X.' prefix if it exists
colnames(Loadings_NLvsL) <- gsub("^X\\.", "", colnames(Loadings_NLvsL))

# Now, select the columns of interest
Loadings_NLvsL <- Loadings_NLvsL %>%
  dplyr::select(rowname, GroupContrib, importance)

perf_PLSDA_NLvsL <- perf(PLSDA_NLvsL, validation = "Mfold", folds=5) #perform M-fold or loo
plot(perf_PLSDA_NLvsL, legend = FALSE)

VIPs_NLvsL <- as.data.frame(mixOmics::vip(PLSDA_NLvsL))
VIPs_NLvsL_filter <- dplyr::filter(VIPs_NLvsL, VIPs_NLvsL$comp1 > 1) # larger than 1 is seen as an important component
VIPs_NLvsL_filter$ID <- rownames(VIPs_NLvsL_filter)
VIPs_NLvsL_select <- VIPs_NLvsL_filter %>% dplyr::select(ID, comp1)
VIPs_NLvsL_Load <- VIPs_NLvsL_select %>% 
  left_join(Loadings_NLvsL, by = c("ID" = "rowname")) %>% arrange(desc(comp1)) %>%
  left_join(info_feature_complete, by = c("ID" = "Feature")) %>% dplyr::select(1:8)
```

```{r}
set.seed(123) # For reproducibility
repeats <- 10 # Number of repetitions

# Initialize a list to store error rates from each repetition
overall_error_rates <- list()

# Repeat the `perf` function 5 times and store results
for (i in 1:repeats) {
  perf_PLSDA_NLvsL1 <- perf(PLSDA_NLvsL, validation = "Mfold", folds = 5, progressBar = FALSE)
  overall_error_rates[[i]] <- perf_PLSDA_NLvsL1$error.rate$overall
}

max_dist_errors_NLvsL <- sapply(overall_error_rates, function(x) x[, "max.dist"])

# Calculate the average error rate for `max.dist` across repetitions
avg_max_dist_NLvsL <- rowMeans(max_dist_errors_NLvsL)

# Display the average error rate for each component
print(avg_max_dist_NLvsL)
```
```{r}
write_csv(x = VIPs_NLvsL_Load, file = "../Output/VIPs_NLvsL_Load_data_clean6_12072024.csv")
```

```{r}
write_csv(x = VIPs_NLvsL_Load, file = "../Output/VIPs_NLvsL_Load_data_method2_11212024.csv")
```
```{r}
combined_pca <- ggarrange(PCA_LvsH_plot, PCA_NLvsH_plot, PCA_NLvsL_plot, PLSDA_LvsH_plot, PLSDA_NLvsH_plot, PLSDA_NLvsL_plot, ncol = 3, nrow =2, labels = c("a", "b", "c", "d", "e", "f"), align ="hv", common.legend = FALSE)

```

```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/combined_PCA_PLSDA_data_outliersPC1.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 14, height = 7, units = "in")
```
```{r}
skin_Acne_NL_L <- VIPs_NLvsL_Load %>% dplyr::filter(GroupContrib == "Acne Non-lesional") 
skin_Acne_L_NL <- VIPs_NLvsL_Load %>% dplyr::filter(GroupContrib == "Acne Lesional") 
```
```{r}
data_NLL <- data_sample %>%
  dplyr::select("SampleID", skin_Acne_NL_L$ID, skin_Acne_L_NL$ID) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Acne_NL = rowSums(select(., skin_Acne_NL_L$ID))) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Acne_L = rowSums(select(., skin_Acne_L_NL$ID))) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Ratio = log(Acne_L/Acne_NL)) %>%
  left_join(metadata_final) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group = factor(category_label, levels = c("Healthy", "Acne Lesional", "Acne Non-lesional")))

```
```{r}

data_NLL_plot <- data_NLL %>% 
  ggboxplot(x = "category_label", y = "Ratio", legend = "none",
            title = "Driving Metabolic Features", 
            ylab = "Ratio (Top Acne_L/Top Acne_NL)", xlab = FALSE,
            add = "jitter", palette = c("#423fa6", "#dd7963", "#67b2be"),
            add.params = list(color = "category_label", alpha = 0.6)) + 
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("Acne Lesional", "Healthy"), c("Acne Lesional", "Acne Non-lesional"),
                                        c("Healthy", "Acne Non-lesional")), label = "p.signif") + 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10), 
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8), # Ensure x-axis text is visible and not blank
        axis.ticks.x = element_line())        # Ensure x-axis ticks are visible
anova <- aov(Ratio ~ category_label, data_NLL)
tukey_hsd(anova)
```
```{r}
ggsave("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/boxplot_method1_ratioAcne_NLvsL.png", plot = last_plot(), dpi = 300, width = 6, height = 4, units = "in")
```

```{r}
list_NLvsL_method1 <- list(
  `Lesional` = VIPs_NLvsL_Load %>%
    filter(GroupContrib == "Acne Lesional") %>%
    pull(ID), # Extract the IDs of features enriched in Lesional
  
  `Non-lesional` = VIPs_NLvsL_Load %>%
    filter(GroupContrib == "Acne Non-lesional") %>%
    pull(ID)  # Extract the IDs of features enriched in Healthy
)
upset_NLvsL_method1 <- upset(fromList(list_NLvsL_method1), order.by = "freq")
```


```{r}
#upset plot of all significant features within Method 1

# Step 1: Extract significant feature IDs for each comparison
LvsH_features <- VIPs_LvsH_Load  %>% pull(ID)
NLvsH_features <- VIPs_NLvsH_Load %>% pull(ID)
LvsNL_features <- VIPs_NLvsL_Load  %>% pull(ID)

# Step 2: Create a binary data frame indicating the presence of features in each comparison
all_features <- unique(c(LvsH_features, NLvsH_features, LvsNL_features))

binary_matrix <- data.frame(
  FeatureID = all_features,
  LvsH = ifelse(all_features %in% LvsH_features, 1, 0),
  NLvsH = ifelse(all_features %in% NLvsH_features, 1, 0),
  LvsNL = ifelse(all_features %in% LvsNL_features, 1, 0)
)

# Step 3: Generate the upset plot
upset_method2 <-upset(binary_matrix, sets = c("LvsH", "NLvsH", "LvsNL"), order.by = "freq")

```



```{r}
# Step 1: Extract significant feature IDs for each comparison and direction Method 1
LvsH_increased_L_method1 <- VIPs_LvsH_Load %>%
  filter(GroupContrib == "Acne Lesional") %>%
  pull(ID)

LvsH_decreased_L_method1 <- VIPs_LvsH_Load %>%
  filter(GroupContrib == "Healthy") %>%
  pull(ID)

NLvsH_increased_NL_method1 <- VIPs_NLvsH_Load %>%
  filter(GroupContrib == "Acne Non-lesional") %>%
  pull(ID)

NLvsH_decreased_NL_method1 <- VIPs_NLvsH_Load %>%
  filter(GroupContrib == "Healthy") %>%
  pull(ID)

LvsNL_increased_L_method1 <- VIPs_NLvsL_Load %>%
  filter(GroupContrib == "Acne Lesional") %>%
  pull(ID)

LvsNL_decreased_L_method1 <- VIPs_NLvsL_Load %>%
  filter(GroupContrib == "Acne Non-lesional") %>%
  pull(ID)
```

```{r}
# Step 1: Extract significant feature IDs for each comparison and direction Method 2
LvsH_increased_L_method2 <- VIPs_LvsH_Load %>%
  filter(GroupContrib == "Acne Lesional") %>%
  pull(ID)

LvsH_decreased_L_method2 <- VIPs_LvsH_Load %>%
  filter(GroupContrib == "Healthy") %>%
  pull(ID)

NLvsH_increased_NL_method2 <- VIPs_NLvsH_Load %>%
  filter(GroupContrib == "Acne Non-lesional") %>%
  pull(ID)

NLvsH_decreased_NL_method2 <- VIPs_NLvsH_Load %>%
  filter(GroupContrib == "Healthy") %>%
  pull(ID)

LvsNL_increased_L_method2 <- VIPs_NLvsL_Load %>%
  filter(GroupContrib == "Acne Lesional") %>%
  pull(ID)

LvsNL_decreased_L_method2 <- VIPs_NLvsL_Load %>%
  filter(GroupContrib == "Acne Non-lesional") %>%
  pull(ID)
```


```{r}
# Step 2: Combine all features into unique identifiers
all_features <- unique(c(
  LvsH_increased_L_method1, LvsH_decreased_L_method1,
  NLvsH_increased_NL_method1, NLvsH_decreased_NL_method1,
  LvsNL_increased_L_method1, LvsNL_decreased_L_method1
))


```

```{r}
# Step 2: Combine all features into unique identifiers
all_features <- unique(c(
  LvsH_increased_L_method2, LvsH_decreased_L_method2,
  NLvsH_increased_NL_method2, NLvsH_decreased_NL_method2,
  LvsNL_increased_L_method2, LvsNL_decreased_L_method2
))


```


```{r}
# Step 2: Combine all features into unique identifiers
all_features <- unique(c(
  LvsH_increased_L_method1, LvsH_decreased_L_method1,
  NLvsH_increased_NL_method1, NLvsH_decreased_NL_method1,
  LvsNL_increased_L_method1, LvsNL_decreased_L_method1,
  LvsH_increased_L_method2, LvsH_decreased_L_method2,
  NLvsH_increased_NL_method2, NLvsH_decreased_NL_method2,
  LvsNL_increased_L_method2, LvsNL_decreased_L_method2
))


```
```{r}

# Step 3: Create a binary data frame for presence/absence
binary_matrix <- data.frame(
  FeatureID = all_features,
  LvsH_increased_L_method1 = ifelse(all_features %in% LvsH_increased_L_method1, 1, 0),
  LvsH_decreased_L_method1 = ifelse(all_features %in% LvsH_decreased_L_method1, 1, 0),
  NLvsH_increased_NL_method1 = ifelse(all_features %in% NLvsH_increased_NL_method1, 1, 0),
  NLvsH_decreased_NL_method1 = ifelse(all_features %in% NLvsH_decreased_NL_method1, 1, 0),
  LvsNL_increased_L_method1 = ifelse(all_features %in% LvsNL_increased_L_method1, 1, 0),
  LvsNL_decreased_L_method1 = ifelse(all_features %in% LvsNL_decreased_L_method1, 1, 0)
)

# Step 4: Generate the upset plot

upset_method1 <- upset(
  binary_matrix,
  sets = c(
    "LvsH_increased_L_method1", "LvsH_decreased_L_method1",
    "NLvsH_increased_NL_method1", "NLvsH_decreased_NL_method1",
    "LvsNL_increased_L_method1", "LvsNL_decreased_L_method1"
  ),
  order.by = "freq"
)
```

```{r}

# Step 3: Create a binary data frame for presence/absence
binary_matrix <- data.frame(
  FeatureID = all_features,
  LvsH_increased_L_method2 = ifelse(all_features %in% LvsH_increased_L_method2, 1, 0),
  LvsH_decreased_L_method2 = ifelse(all_features %in% LvsH_decreased_L_method2, 1, 0),
  NLvsH_increased_NL_method2 = ifelse(all_features %in% NLvsH_increased_NL_method2, 1, 0),
  NLvsH_decreased_NL_method2 = ifelse(all_features %in% NLvsH_decreased_NL_method2, 1, 0),
  LvsNL_increased_L_method2 = ifelse(all_features %in% LvsNL_increased_L_method2, 1, 0),
  LvsNL_decreased_L_method2 = ifelse(all_features %in% LvsNL_decreased_L_method2, 1, 0)
)

# Step 4: Generate the upset plot

upset_method2 <- UpSetR::upset(
  binary_matrix,
  sets = c(
    "LvsH_increased_L_method2", "LvsH_decreased_L_method2",
    "NLvsH_increased_NL_method2", "NLvsH_decreased_NL_method2",
    "LvsNL_increased_L_method2", "LvsNL_decreased_L_method2"
  ),
  order.by = "freq",
  main.bar.color = "grey23"
)
```

```{r}
custom_colors <- c("#423FA6", "#FF0000", "#C94671", "#DD7963" , "#8DA815", "grey7", "#848937", "#D2AA06",  "#B25127","grey10", "#88ADE5", "#669B9B", "#C43F97", "#9C140C", "#8155DB",  "#D1ADF4" )
```


```{r}
upset_method2 <- UpSetR::upset(
  binary_matrix,
  sets = c(
    "LvsH_decreased_L_method2", "NLvsH_decreased_NL_method2",
    "LvsH_increased_L_method2", "NLvsH_increased_NL_method2",
    "LvsNL_increased_L_method2", "LvsNL_decreased_L_method2"
  ),
  order.by = "freq", keep.order = TRUE,
  main.bar.color = custom_colors
)
```

```{r}
colnames(binary_matrix) <- c(
  "FeatureID",                    # Keep the first column as it is
  "Increased Lesional vs Healthy",    # New name for LvsH_decreased_L_method2
  "Decreased Lesional vs Healthy",  # New name for NLvsH_decreased_NL_method2
  "Increased Non-lesional vs Healthy",    # New name for LvsH_increased_L_method2
  "Decreased Non-lesional vs Healthy",  # New name for NLvsH_increased_NL_method2
  "Increased Lesional vs Non-lesional",   # New name for LvsNL_increased_L_method2
  "Decreased Lesional vs Non-lesional"    # New name for LvsNL_decreased_L_method2
)
```

```{r}
# Reverse the degree order
bar_order <- rev(row.names(upset_data$Main_bar))

# Step 2: Reorder custom_colors based on the new bar order
new_colors <- custom_colors[match(bar_order, colnames(binary_matrix)[-1])]

```


```{r}
upset_method2 <- UpSetR::upset(
  binary_matrix,
  sets = c(  # Reverse the order of sets
    "Decreased Lesional vs Healthy", "Decreased Non-lesional vs Healthy",
    "Increased Lesional vs Healthy", "Increased Non-lesional vs Healthy",
    "Increased Lesional vs Non-lesional", "Decreased Lesional vs Non-lesional"
  ),
  order.by = "freq", keep.order = TRUE,
  main.bar.color = custom_colors
)
```


```{r}
# Step 4: Generate the upset plot

upset_method2 <- upset(
  binary_matrix,
  sets = c(
    "LvsH_increased_L_method2", "LvsNL_increased_L_method2",
    "NLvsH_increased_NL_method2", "LvsH_decreased_L_method2",
    "NLvsH_decreased_NL_method2","LvsNL_decreased_L_method2"
  ),
  order.by = "freq", keep.order= T
)
```



```{r}
# Step 3: Create a binary data frame for presence/absence
binary_matrix <- data.frame(
  FeatureID = all_features,
  LvsH_increased_L_method1 = ifelse(all_features %in% LvsH_increased_L_method1, 1, 0),
  LvsH_decreased_L_method1 = ifelse(all_features %in% LvsH_decreased_L_method1, 1, 0),
  NLvsH_increased_NL_method1 = ifelse(all_features %in% NLvsH_increased_NL_method1, 1, 0),
  NLvsH_decreased_NL_method1 = ifelse(all_features %in% NLvsH_decreased_NL_method1, 1, 0),
  LvsNL_increased_L_method1 = ifelse(all_features %in% LvsNL_increased_L_method1, 1, 0),
  LvsNL_decreased_L_method1 = ifelse(all_features %in% LvsNL_decreased_L_method1, 1, 0),
  LvsH_increased_L_method2 = ifelse(all_features %in% LvsH_increased_L_method2, 1, 0),
  LvsH_decreased_L_method2 = ifelse(all_features %in% LvsH_decreased_L_method2, 1, 0),
  NLvsH_increased_NL_method2 = ifelse(all_features %in% NLvsH_increased_NL_method2, 1, 0),
  NLvsH_decreased_NL_method2 = ifelse(all_features %in% NLvsH_decreased_NL_method2, 1, 0),
  LvsNL_increased_L_method2 = ifelse(all_features %in% LvsNL_increased_L_method2, 1, 0),
  LvsNL_decreased_L_method2 = ifelse(all_features %in% LvsNL_decreased_L_method2, 1, 0)
)

upset_method1_2 <- upset(
  binary_matrix,
  sets = c(
    "LvsH_increased_L_method1", "LvsH_decreased_L_method1",
    "NLvsH_increased_NL_method1", "NLvsH_decreased_NL_method1",
    "LvsNL_increased_L_method1", "LvsNL_decreased_L_method1",
    "LvsH_increased_L_method2", "LvsH_decreased_L_method2",
    "NLvsH_increased_NL_method2", "NLvsH_decreased_NL_method2",
    "LvsNL_increased_L_method2", "LvsNL_decreased_L_method2"
  ),
  order.by = "freq"
)
```

```{r}
upset_method1_2 <- upset(
  binary_matrix,
  sets = c(
    "LvsH_increased_L_method1","LvsH_increased_L_method2", 
    "LvsNL_increased_L_method1","LvsNL_increased_L_method2",
    "LvsH_decreased_L_method1","LvsH_decreased_L_method2",
    "LvsNL_decreased_L_method1","LvsNL_decreased_L_method2",
    "NLvsH_increased_NL_method1", "NLvsH_increased_NL_method2",
    "NLvsH_decreased_NL_method1","NLvsH_decreased_NL_method2"
     
  ),
  order.by = "freq", keep.order = T
)

```

```{r}
png("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/6pairwise_upset_method2_freq.png", width = 10, height = 10, units = "in", res = 300)
print(upset_method2)
dev.off()


```

```{r}
#upset plot of all significant features within Method 1 and Method 2
#
# Step 1: Extract significant feature IDs for each comparison
LvsH_features_method1 <- VIPs_LvsH_Load  %>% pull(ID)
NLvsH_features_method1 <- VIPs_NLvsH_Load %>% pull(ID)
LvsNL_features_method1 <- VIPs_NLvsL_Load  %>% pull(ID)

```

```{r}
#Method2 
LvsH_features_method2 <- VIPs_LvsH_Load  %>% pull(ID)
NLvsH_features_method2 <- VIPs_NLvsH_Load %>% pull(ID)
LvsNL_features_method2 <- VIPs_NLvsL_Load  %>% pull(ID)
```

```{r}
# Step 2: Create a binary data frame indicating the presence of features in each comparison
all_features <- unique(c(LvsH_features_method1, NLvsH_features_method1, LvsNL_features_method1,LvsH_features_method2, NLvsH_features_method2, LvsNL_features_method2))

binary_matrix <- data.frame(
  FeatureID = all_features,
  LvsH_method1 = ifelse(all_features %in% LvsH_features_method1, 1, 0),
  NLvsH_method1 = ifelse(all_features %in% NLvsH_features_method1, 1, 0),
  LvsNL_method1 = ifelse(all_features %in% LvsNL_features_method1, 1, 0),
  LvsH_method2 = ifelse(all_features %in% LvsH_features_method2, 1, 0),
  NLvsH_method2 = ifelse(all_features %in% NLvsH_features_method2, 1, 0),
  LvsNL_method2 = ifelse(all_features %in% LvsNL_features_method2, 1, 0)
)

# Step 3: Generate the upset plot
upset_between <-upset(binary_matrix, sets = c("LvsH_method1", "NLvsH_method1", "LvsNL_method1","LvsH_method2", "NLvsH_method2", "LvsNL_method2"), order.by = "freq")


```


```{r}
png("../Figures/metabolomics_Figures/upset_between.png", width = 10, height = 10, units = "in", res = 300)
print(upset_between)
dev.off()
```

#######################################################
# Feature affected by Acne and exacerbated by Lesions and features increased in Acne Non-lesional vs Healthy or healthy vs Acne Non-lesional -- but avoid overlap with features that are increased/decreased in Acne but also increased decreased in pairwise comparison of Acne_L vs Acne_NL!#
#######################################################
```{r}
feature_interest <- VIPs_LvsH_Load %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, comp1, GroupContrib, Compound_Name) %>%
  dplyr::rename(vip_LvsH = "comp1", group_LvsH = "GroupContrib") %>%
  full_join(VIPs_NLvsH_Load %>%
              dplyr::select(ID, comp1, GroupContrib) %>%
              dplyr::rename(vip_NLvsH = "comp1", group_NLvsH = "GroupContrib"),
            by = "ID") %>%
  full_join(VIPs_NLvsL_Load %>%
              dplyr::select(ID, comp1, GroupContrib) %>%
              dplyr::rename(vip_NLvsL = "comp1", group_NLvsL = "GroupContrib"),
            by = "ID") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(combined_vip = rowSums(cbind(vip_LvsH, vip_NLvsH, vip_NLvsL), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Group = paste(group_LvsH, group_NLvsH, group_NLvsL, sep = "_")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Outcome = case_when(group_LvsH == "Acne Lesional" & group_NLvsH == "Acne Non-lesional" & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased in Acne",
                                    group_LvsH == "Healthy" & group_NLvsH == "Healthy" & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Decreased in Acne",
                                    group_LvsH == "Acne Lesional" & group_NLvsH == "Acne Non-lesional" & group_NLvsL== "Acne Lesional" ~ "Increased in Acne compared to healthy and increased in Lesions compared to Non-lesions",
                                    group_LvsH == "Acne Lesional" & group_NLvsH == "Acne Non-lesional" & group_NLvsL== "Acne Non-lesional" ~ "Increased in Acne compared to healthy and increased in Non-lesions compared to Lesions",
                                    group_LvsH == "Healthy" & group_NLvsH == "Healthy" & group_NLvsL== "Acne Non-lesional" ~ "Decreased in Acne compared to healthy and increased in Non-lesions compared to Lesions",
                                    group_LvsH == "Healthy" & group_NLvsH == "Healthy" & group_NLvsL== "Acne Lesional" ~ "Decreased in Acne compared to healthy and increased in Lesions compared to non-lesions",
                                    group_LvsH == "Acne Lesional" & is.na(group_NLvsH) & group_NLvsL == "Acne Lesional" ~ "Increased in Acne Lesions",
                                    is.na(group_LvsH) & is.na(group_NLvsH) & group_NLvsL == "Acne Lesional" ~ "Increased in Acne Lesions compared to Non-Lesions",
                                    is.na(group_LvsH) & is.na(group_NLvsH) & group_NLvsL == "Acne Non-lesional" ~ "Increased in Acne Non-Lesions compared to Lesions",
                                    group_LvsH=="Acne Lesional" & is.na(group_NLvsH) & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased in Acne Lesions compared to Healthy",
                                    is.na(group_LvsH) & group_NLvsH == "Acne Non-lesional" & group_NLvsL == "Acne Non-lesional" ~ "Increased in Acne Non-lesions",
                                    is.na(group_LvsH) & group_NLvsH == "Acne Non-lesional" & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased in Acne Non-lesions compared to Healthy",
                                    is.na(group_LvsH) & group_NLvsH == "Healthy" & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased in Healthy compared to Acne Non-lesions",
                                    group_LvsH == "Healthy" & is.na(group_NLvsH) & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased in Healthy compared to Acne Lesions",
                                    TRUE ~ "remove")) %>% dplyr::filter(Outcome != "remove")

```




#######################################################
# Feature affected by Acne and exacerbated by Lesions and features increased in Acne Non-lesional vs Healthy or healthy vs Acne Non-lesional#
#######################################################
--> not correct as you have similar feature IDs 

```{r}
#comparison included in first cytoscape
feature_interest <- VIPs_LvsH_Load %>% dplyr::select(ID, comp1, GroupContrib) %>%
  dplyr::rename(vip_LvsH = "comp1", group_LvsH = "GroupContrib") %>% 
  full_join(VIPs_NLvsH_Load) %>% 
  dplyr::rename(vip_NLvsH = "comp1", group_NLvsH = "GroupContrib") %>%
  full_join(VIPs_NLvsL_Load) %>% 
  dplyr::rename(vip_NLvsL = "comp1", group_NLvsL = "GroupContrib") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(combined_vip = rowSums(cbind(vip_LvsH, vip_NLvsH, vip_NLvsL), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Group = paste(group_LvsH, group_NLvsH, group_NLvsL, sep = "_")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Outcome = case_when(group_LvsH == "Acne Lesional" & group_NLvsH == "Acne Non-lesional" & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased in Acne",
                                    group_LvsH == "Healthy" & group_NLvsH == "Healthy" & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Decreased in Acne",
                                    group_LvsH == "Acne Lesional" & is.na(group_NLvsH) & group_NLvsL == "Acne Lesional" ~ "Increased in Acne Lesions",
                                    is.na(group_LvsH) & is.na(group_NLvsH) & group_NLvsL == "Acne Lesional" ~ "Increased in Acne Lesions compared to Non-Lesions",
                                    is.na(group_LvsH) & is.na(group_NLvsH) & group_NLvsL == "Acne Non-lesional" ~ "Increased in Acne Non-Lesions compared to Lesions",
                                    group_LvsH=="Acne Lesional" & is.na(group_NLvsH) & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased in Acne Lesions compared to Healthy",
                                    is.na(group_LvsH) & group_NLvsH == "Acne Non-lesional" & group_NLvsL == "Acne Non-lesional" ~ "Increased in Acne Non-lesions",
                                    is.na(group_LvsH) & group_NLvsH == "Acne Non-lesional" & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased in Acne Non-lesions compared to Healthy",
                                    is.na(group_LvsH) & group_NLvsH == "Healthy" & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased in Healthy compared to Acne Non-lesions",
                                    group_LvsH == "Healthy" & is.na(group_NLvsH) & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased in Healthy compared to Acne Lesions",
                                    TRUE ~ "remove")) %>% dplyr::filter(Outcome != "remove")
    
```

```{r}
feature_interest2 <- feature_interest %>% dplyr::select(ID, Compound_Name, Outcome)
```

```{r}
feature_interest <- VIPs_LvsH_Load %>% dplyr::select(ID, comp1, GroupContrib) %>%
  dplyr::rename(vip_LvsH = "comp1", group_LvsH = "GroupContrib") %>% 
  full_join(VIPs_NLvsH_Load) %>% 
  dplyr::rename(vip_NLvsH = "comp1", group_NLvsH = "GroupContrib") %>%
  full_join(VIPs_NLvsL_Load) %>% 
  dplyr::rename(vip_NLvsL = "comp1", group_NLvsL = "GroupContrib") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(combined_vip = rowSums(cbind(vip_LvsH, vip_NLvsH, vip_NLvsL), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Group = paste(group_LvsH, group_NLvsH, group_NLvsL, sep = "_")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Outcome = case_when(group_LvsH == "Acne_L" & group_NLvsH == "Acne_NL" & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased in Acne",
                                    group_LvsH == "Healthy" & group_NLvsH == "Healthy" & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Decreased in Acne",
                                    group_LvsH == "Acne_L" & is.na(group_NLvsH) & group_NLvsL == "Acne_L" ~ "Increased in Acne Lesions",
                                    is.na(group_LvsH) & is.na(group_NLvsH) & group_NLvsL == "Acne_L" ~ "Increased in Acne Lesions compared to Non-Lesions",
                                    group_LvsH=="Acne_L" & is.na(group_NLvsH) & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased in Acne Lesions compared to Healthy",
                                    is.na(group_LvsH) & group_NLvsH="Acne_NL" & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased in Acne Lesions compared to Healthy",
                                    TRUE ~ "remove")) %>% dplyr::filter(Outcome != "remove")
```

#######################################################
# Feature affected by Acne and exacerbated by Lesions #
#######################################################

```{r}
#comparison included in first cytoscape
feature_interest <- VIPs_LvsH_Load %>% dplyr::select(ID, comp1, GroupContrib) %>%
  dplyr::rename(vip_LvsH = "comp1", group_LvsH = "GroupContrib") %>% 
  full_join(VIPs_NLvsH_Load) %>% 
  dplyr::rename(vip_NLvsH = "comp1", group_NLvsH = "GroupContrib") %>%
  full_join(VIPs_NLvsL_Load) %>% 
  dplyr::rename(vip_NLvsL = "comp1", group_NLvsL = "GroupContrib") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(combined_vip = rowSums(cbind(vip_LvsH, vip_NLvsH, vip_NLvsL), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Group = paste(group_LvsH, group_NLvsH, group_NLvsL, sep = "_")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Outcome = case_when(group_LvsH == "Acne_L" & group_NLvsH == "Acne_NL" & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased in Acne",
                                    group_LvsH == "Healthy" & group_NLvsH == "Healthy" & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Decreased in Acne",
                                    group_LvsH == "Acne_L" & is.na(group_NLvsH) & group_NLvsL == "Acne_L" ~ "Increased in Acne Lesions",
                                    is.na(group_LvsH) & is.na(group_NLvsH) & group_NLvsL == "Acne_L" ~ "Increased in Acne Lesions compared to Non-Lesions",
                                    group_LvsH=="Acne_L" & is.na(group_NLvsH) & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased in Acne Lesions compared to Healthy",
                                    TRUE ~ "remove")) %>% dplyr::filter(Outcome != "remove")
    
```
```{r}
feature_interest <- VIPs_LvsH_Load %>% dplyr::select(ID, comp1, GroupContrib) %>%
  dplyr::rename(vip_LvsH = "comp1", group_LvsH = "GroupContrib") %>% 
  full_join(VIPs_NLvsH_Load) %>% 
  dplyr::rename(vip_NLvsH = "comp1", group_NLvsH = "GroupContrib") %>%
  full_join(VIPs_NLvsL_Load) %>% 
  dplyr::rename(vip_NLvsL = "comp1", group_NLvsL = "GroupContrib") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(combined_vip = rowSums(cbind(vip_LvsH, vip_NLvsH, vip_NLvsL), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Group = paste(group_LvsH, group_NLvsH, group_NLvsL, sep = "_")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Outcome = case_when(group_LvsH == "Acne_L" & group_NLvsH == "Acne_NL" & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased in Acne",
                                    group_LvsH == "Healthy" & group_NLvsH == "Healthy" & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Decreased in Acne",
                                    group_LvsH == "Acne_L" & is.na(group_NLvsH) & group_NLvsL == "Acne_L" ~ "Increased in Acne Lesions",
                                    is.na(group_LvsH) & is.na(group_NLvsH) & group_NLvsL == "Acne_L" ~ "Increased in Acne Lesions compared to Non-Lesions",
                                    group_LvsH=="Acne_L" & is.na(group_NLvsH) & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased in Acne Lesions compared to Healthy",
                                    is.na(group_LvsH) & group_NLvsH="Acne_NL" & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased in Acne Lesions compared to Healthy",
                                    TRUE ~ "remove")) %>% dplyr::filter(Outcome != "remove")
```

###################################################################
# Feature affected in Acne_L skin vs Acne_NL skin vs Healthy skin #
###################################################################
```{r}
feature_interest <- VIPs_LvsH_Load %>% dplyr::select(ID, comp1, GroupContrib) %>%
  dplyr::rename(vip_LvsH = "comp1", group_LvsH = "GroupContrib") %>% 
  full_join(VIPs_NLvsH_Load) %>% 
  dplyr::rename(vip_NLvsH = "comp1", group_NLvsH = "GroupContrib") %>%
  full_join(VIPs_NLvsL_Load) %>% 
  dplyr::rename(vip_NLvsL = "comp1", group_NLvsL = "GroupContrib") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(combined_vip = rowSums(cbind(vip_LvsH, vip_NLvsH, vip_NLvsL), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Group = paste(group_LvsH, group_NLvsH, group_NLvsL, sep = "_")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Outcome = case_when(
    # Lesional vs Healthy comparisons
    group_LvsH == "Acne_L" & is.na(group_NLvsH)  & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased Acne_L vs Healthy",
    group_LvsH == "Healthy" & is.na(group_NLvsH)  & group_NLvsL== "Acne_NL" ~ "Increased Acne_NL and Healthy vs Acne_L",
    group_LvsH == "Healthy" & group_NLvsH == "Acne_NL"  & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased Healthy vs Acne_L and Acne_NL vs Healthy",
    group_LvsH == "Acne_L" & is.na(group_NLvsH)  & group_NLvsL=="Acne_L" ~ "Increased Acne_L vs Healthy and Acne_NL",
    group_LvsH == "Acne_L" & group_NLvsH=="Acne_NL"  & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased Acne_L and Acne_NL vs Healthy" ,
    group_LvsH == "Healthy" & group_NLvsH=="Healthy"  & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased Healthy vs Acne_L and Acne_NL" ,
    group_LvsH == "Healthy" & is.na(group_NLvsH)  & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased Healthy vs Acne_L" ,
    is.na(group_LvsH) & group_NLvsH=="Healthy"  & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased Healthy vs Acne_NL" ,
    is.na(group_LvsH) & group_NLvsH=="Acne_NL"  & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased Acne_NL vs Healthy" ,
    is.na(group_LvsH) & is.na(group_NLvsH)  & group_NLvsL=="Acne_L" ~ "Increased Acne_L vs Acne_NL",
    is.na(group_LvsH) & is.na(group_NLvsH)  & group_NLvsL=="Acne_NL" ~ "Increased Acne_NL vs Acne_L",
    group_LvsH == "Acne_L" & group_NLvsH=="Healthy"  & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased Healthy vs Acne_NL and in Acne_L vs Healthy",
                                    TRUE ~ "remove")) %>% dplyr::filter(Outcome != "remove")
```


```{r}
#keep only interesting features
feature_interest <- VIPs_LvsH_Load %>% dplyr::select(ID, comp1, GroupContrib) %>%
  dplyr::rename(vip_LvsH = "comp1", group_LvsH = "GroupContrib") %>% 
  full_join(VIPs_NLvsH_Load) %>% 
  dplyr::rename(vip_NLvsH = "comp1", group_NLvsH = "GroupContrib") %>%
  full_join(VIPs_NLvsL_Load) %>% 
  dplyr::rename(vip_NLvsL = "comp1", group_NLvsL = "GroupContrib") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(combined_vip = rowSums(cbind(vip_LvsH, vip_NLvsH, vip_NLvsL), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Group = paste(group_LvsH, group_NLvsH, group_NLvsL, sep = "_")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Outcome = case_when(
    # Lesional vs Healthy comparisons
    group_LvsH == "Acne_L" & is.na(group_NLvsH)  & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased Acne_L vs Healthy",
    group_LvsH == "Acne_L" & is.na(group_NLvsH)  & group_NLvsL=="Acne_L" ~ "Increased Acne_L vs Healthy and Acne_NL", #not present
    group_LvsH == "Acne_L" & group_NLvsH=="Acne_NL"  & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased Acne_L and Acne_NL vs Healthy" ,
    group_LvsH == "Healthy" & group_NLvsH=="Healthy"  & is.na(group_NLvsL) ~ "Increased Healthy vs Acne_L and Acne_NL" ,
    is.na(group_LvsH) & is.na(group_NLvsH)  & group_NLvsL=="Acne_L" ~ "Increased Acne_L vs Acne_NL",
    group_LvsH == "Healthy" & is.na(group_NLvsH)  & group_NLvsL=="Acne_NL" ~ "Increased Healthy and Acne_NL vs Acne_L" # not present,
    
                                    TRUE ~ "remove")) %>% dplyr::filter(Outcome != "remove")
```

```{r}
summary(factor(feature_interest$Outcome))
```

```{r}
feature_Acne_Healthy <- feature_interest %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Outcome == "Increased Acne_L and Acne_NL vs Healthy")

feature_Acne_L_Healthy <- feature_interest %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Outcome == "Increased Acne_L vs Healthy")

feature_Acne_L_NL <- feature_interest %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Outcome == "Increased Acne_L vs Acne_NL")


feature_Healthy_Acne <- feature_interest %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Outcome == "Increased Healthy vs Acne_L and Acne_NL")


```

```{r}
feature_Acne <- feature_interest %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Outcome == "Increased in Acne")

feature_Healthy <- feature_interest %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Outcome == "Decreased in Acne")

feature_Acne_L_NL <- feature_interest %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Outcome == "Increased in Acne Lesions compared to Non-Lesions")


feature_Acne_L_Healthy <- feature_interest %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Outcome == "Increased in Acne Lesions compared to Healthy")

```


```{r}
# Extract exacerbated features
final_features <- feature_interest %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Outcome %in% c( "Increased in Acne", "Decreased in Acne","Increased in Acne Lesions compared to Non-Lesions", "Increased in Acne Lesions compared to Healthy"))
```


```{r}
write_csv(x = feature_interest, file = "../Output/list_features_interest_method2_11212024.csv")
#write_csv(x = feature_interest, file = "../Output/list_features_interest_data_clean6_12072024.csv")
#write_csv(x = final_features, file = "../output/list_feaures_interest_Acne.csv")
```

```{r}
# Load the data
table1 <- read.csv("../Output/list_features_interest_data_clean6_12072024.csv")
table2 <- read.csv("../Output/list_features_interest_11072024.csv")

# Ensure both tables have the required columns: ID and Outcome
if(!all(c("ID", "Outcome") %in% colnames(table1)) || !all(c("ID", "Outcome") %in% colnames(table2))) {
  stop("Both tables must contain 'ID' and 'Outcome' columns.")
}

# Get the intersection of features for each condition in Outcome
shared_features <- table1 %>%
  inner_join(table2, by = c("ID", "Outcome")) %>%
  group_by(Outcome) %>%
  summarize(shared_count = n())

# Display the result
print(shared_features)
```


```{r}

# Load the data
table1 <- read.csv("../Output/list_features_interest_data_clean6_12072024.csv")
table2 <- read.csv("../Output/list_features_interest_11072024.csv")

# Ensure both tables have the required columns: ID and Outcome
if(!all(c("ID", "Outcome") %in% colnames(table1)) || !all(c("ID", "Outcome") %in% colnames(table2))) {
  stop("Both tables must contain 'ID' and 'Outcome' columns.")
}

# Identify unique IDs in each table
unique_in_table1 <- setdiff(table1$ID, table2$ID)
unique_in_table2 <- setdiff(table2$ID, table1$ID)

# Number of features unique to each table
num_unique_in_table1 <- length(unique_in_table1)
num_unique_in_table2 <- length(unique_in_table2)

# Find features present in both tables
shared_features <- inner_join(table1, table2, by = "ID", suffix = c("_table1", "_table2"))

# Features present in both tables with the same Outcome
same_outcome_features <- shared_features %>%
  filter(Outcome_table1 == Outcome_table2) %>%
  select(ID,  Outcome_table1, Outcome_table2)

# Number of features with the same Outcome
num_same_outcome <- nrow(same_outcome_features)

# Features present in both tables with different Outcomes
different_outcome_features <- shared_features %>%
  filter(Outcome_table1 != Outcome_table2) %>%
  select(ID, Outcome_table1, Outcome_table2)

# Number of features with different Outcomes
num_different_outcome <- nrow(different_outcome_features)

# Display results
cat("Number of features unique to Table 1:", num_unique_in_table1, "\n")
cat("Number of features unique to Table 2:", num_unique_in_table2, "\n")
cat("Number of features present in both tables with the same Outcome:", num_same_outcome, "\n")
cat("Features with the same Outcome:\n")
print(same_outcome_features)
cat("Number of features present in both tables with different Outcomes:", num_different_outcome, "\n")
cat("Features with different Outcomes:\n")
print(different_outcome_features)

```
```{r}
# Load necessary libraries
# Load the data
table1 <- read.csv("../Output/list_features_interest_data_clean6_12072024.csv")
table2 <- read.csv("../Output/list_features_interest_11072024.csv")

# Ensure both tables have the required columns: ID and Outcome
if(!all(c("ID", "Outcome") %in% colnames(table1)) || !all(c("ID", "Outcome") %in% colnames(table2))) {
  stop("Both tables must contain 'ID' and 'Outcome' columns.")
}

# Identify unique IDs in each table
unique_in_table1 <- setdiff(table1$ID, table2$ID)
unique_in_table2 <- setdiff(table2$ID, table1$ID)

# Number of features unique to each table
num_unique_in_table1 <- length(unique_in_table1)
num_unique_in_table2 <- length(unique_in_table2)

# Find features present in both tables
shared_features <- inner_join(table1, table2, by = "ID", suffix = c("_table1", "_table2"))

# Features present in both tables with the same Outcome (unique IDs only)
same_outcome_features <- shared_features %>%
  filter(Outcome_table1 == Outcome_table2) %>%
  distinct(ID, .keep_all = TRUE)  # Keep only unique IDs

# Number of unique features with the same Outcome
num_same_outcome <- nrow(same_outcome_features)

# Features present in both tables with different Outcomes (unique IDs only)
different_outcome_features <- shared_features %>%
  filter(Outcome_table1 != Outcome_table2) %>%
  distinct(ID, .keep_all = TRUE)  # Keep only unique IDs

# Number of unique features with different Outcomes
num_different_outcome <- nrow(different_outcome_features)

# Display results
cat("Number of unique features present in both tables with the same Outcome:", num_same_outcome, "\n")
cat("Features with the same Outcome:\n")
print(same_outcome_features)
cat("Number of unique features present in both tables with different Outcomes:", num_different_outcome, "\n")
cat("Features with different Outcomes:\n")
print(different_outcome_features)

```

```{r}
data_sample <- data_sample_method1
```
```{r}
data_sample <- data_sample_method2
```

```{r}
# Replace SampleID with sample_name
data_sample_name <- data_sample_method1 %>% 
  dplyr::filter(!(str_detect(SampleID, regex("Blank|6mix|Pool|wash|CTL|QC", ignore_case = TRUE)))) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(metadata_final %>% select(SampleID, sample_name), by = "SampleID") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(SampleID = sample_name) %>%
  dplyr::select(-sample_name) %>%
  column_to_rownames("SampleID") %>% 
  select_at(vars(-one_of(nearZeroVar(., names = TRUE)))) %>% 
  rownames_to_column("SampleID")
```


```{r}
write_csv(x = data_sample_name, file = "../Output/data_sample_method1.csv")
```
